column1: Triples the chance of striking an enemy's weapon and shield systems and completely  bypasses the target ship's armor.
column2: 使命中敵艦武器與護盾系統的機率提高三倍,並完全穿透目標艦的裝甲。

column1: Ships with this armor have 8 times the base structure and armor points. The hit points of fighters are multiplied by 4. Adds +25 to ground troop combat strengths.
column2: 裝備此裝甲的艦艇,其基礎結構值與裝甲值提高為8倍。戰鬥機的生命值提高為4倍。地面部隊戰鬥力+25。

column1: Pre-planned, organized colony design techniques. The improvements in organization increase the maximum population that can live on all planets owned by the empire by +5 million colonists.
column2: 事先規劃、有組織的殖民地設計技術。組織效率的提升,使帝國所有行星的最大人口上限增加500萬移民。

column1: Completely repairs ships between battles. Automatically included on all ships once the technology is researched.
column2: 在戰鬥之間完全修復艦艇。此科技一旦研發完成,將自動配備於所有艦艇上。

column1: Provides better control of occupied alien populations: aliens work harder, assimilate into your empire twice as fast, and are half as likely to revolt.
column2: 能更有效控制被佔領的外星人口:外星人工作更努力、同化為帝國子民的速度提高一倍,叛亂機率則減半。

column1: Mechanical workers with a +3 food production bonus. Require 1 production unit per turn instead of food. They are unaffected by morale, receive no racial bonuses, and generate no income.
column2: 機械工人,食物產量+3。每回合僅需消耗1單位生產力,而非食物。不受士氣影響,不享有種族加成,也不產生收入。

column1: Mechanical workers that generate 3 research points per turn. Require 1 production unit per turn instead of food. They are unaffected by morale, receive no racial bonuses, and cannot generate income.
column2: 機械工人,每回合產生3點研究點數。每回合僅需消耗1單位生產力,而非食物。不受士氣影響,不享有種族加成,也無法產生收入。

column1: Mechanical workers with a +3 production bonus. Require 1 production unit per turn instead of food. They are unaffected by morale, receive no racial bonuses, and cannot generate income.
column2: 機械工人,生產力+3。每回合僅需消耗1單位生產力,而非食物。不受士氣影響,不享有種族加成,也無法產生收入。

column1: Allows ground troops and armor to fly, increasing their mobility and defense. Adds +10 to their ground combat rating.
column2: 使地面部隊與裝甲單位獲得飛行能力,提升機動性與防禦力。地面戰鬥力+10。

column1: A high-yield orbital bombardment device engineered to destroy ground forces and colony installations, inflicting 5-40 points of damage per bomb.
column2: 高當量軌道轟炸裝置,專為摧毀地面部隊與殖民地設施而設計,每枚炸彈造成5至40點傷害。

column1: Capable of moving a ship 5 parsecs a turn. All ship drives are automatically upgraded when this technology is discovered.
column2: 使艦艇每回合可移動5秒差距。此科技一經發現,所有艦艇引擎將自動升級。

column1: These torpedoes are balls of antimatter that explode on contact. They travel at a speed of 20 and inflict 25 points of damage and fire every other turn.  Modifications: overloaded, enveloping and ECCM.
column2: 這種魚雷是接觸即爆炸的反物質彈體。飛行速度20,造成25點傷害,每隔一回合發射一次。可改裝選項:超載彈頭、包覆彈頭、電子反反制(ECCM)。

column1: Can only target missiles. They have a maximum range of 15 squares and will fire defensively against approaching missiles if not yet fired in that turn. The  chance to score a hit is 85% minus 5% per square distance.
column2: 只能鎖定飛彈。最大射程15格,若該回合尚未開火,會自動對接近的飛彈進行防禦射擊。命中率為85%,每格距離降低5%。

column1: Creates tank battalions. It has 2 units when built, and adds 1 unit every 10 turns, up to half the planet's population. Eliminates the morale penalty for dictatorships and feudal governments.
column2: 建立戰車營。建成時擁有2個單位,之後每10回合增加1個單位,上限為該行星人口的一半。消除獨裁與封建政體的士氣懲罰。

column1: Network of mines. Ships have a chance of damage based on size: frigate-20%, destroyer-30%, cruiser-40%, battleship-50%, titan-80%, doomstar-100%. Damage is 100-500 points less shields.
column2: 水雷網。艦艇依艦體大小有機率受損:巡防艦20%、驅逐艦30%、巡洋艦40%、戰艦50%、泰坦艦80%、末日星100%。傷害為100至500點,並扣除護盾值。

column1: A colony that has an asteroid field or gas giant within its star system can create a complete artificial planet capable of supporting life.
column2: 若殖民地所在星系內有小行星帶或氣態巨行星,即可建造一顆完整的人工行星,並具備支援生命的能力。

column1: Squadron of 4 shuttles used to move 1 unit of marines each from the launching ship  onto enemy ships. They take 3 hits to destroy, modified by your best armor, and move at a speed of 6.
column2: 由4艘接駁艇組成的中隊,每艘可將1個陸戰隊單位從發射艦艇送上敵艦。需命中3次才能摧毀(依所用最佳裝甲調整),移動速度為6。

column1: Using the most advanced teaching methods available, the efficiency of farmers, workers, and scientists is increased. Each receives a +1 bonus.
column2: 運用最先進的教學方法,提升農夫、工人與科學家的工作效率,各獲得+1加成。

column1: Eliminates many dangerous particles from the atmosphere of a planet. The amount of production is quartered before calculating pollution. Effects are cumulative with a pollution processor.
column2: 消除行星大氣中許多危險微粒。計算污染前,生產力先除以4。效果可與污染處理器疊加。

column1: Increases ship's combat speed by +5.
column2: 艦艇戰鬥速度+5。

column1: A completely automated research facility. Generates 30 research points.
column2: 全自動化研究設施。產生30點研究點數。

column1: Aid industry workers in their building of finished products. Generates 5  production and increases the production each worker generates by +1.
column2: 協助工業工人製造成品。產生5點生產力,並使每位工人的生產力+1。

column1: Repairs a ship during combat, restoring 20% of the armor or structure and 10% of the ship's internal systems each turn during combat. After combat, the ship is completely repaired.
column2: 於戰鬥中修復艦艇,每回合恢復20%的裝甲或結構,以及10%的艦內系統。戰鬥結束後,艦艇將完全修復。

column1: Giant robot fighting vehicles superior in power and mobility to conventional tanks. They have a +10 bonus to their combat rating and take 3 hits to destroy.
column2: 巨型機器人戰鬥載具,火力與機動性皆優於傳統戰車。戰鬥力+10,需命中3次才能摧毀。

column1: Battle Pods increase the available space on a ship by 50%.
column2: 戰鬥艙使艦艇可用空間增加50%。

column1: Increases a ship's chance to hit with beam weapons by +50%. Adds +2 parsecs to galactic scanning range.
column2: 使艦艇光束武器命中率+50%。銀河掃描範圍+2秒差距。

column1: Heavily armed star base, with +4 parsec scanning range bonus. Adds +10% to the offense of ships in combat around it. Replaces a star base.
column2: 重武裝星際基地,掃描範圍+4秒差距。使周邊參戰艦艇攻擊力+10%。取代原有星際基地。

column1: The most advanced biochemical weapon ever devised, with a 20% chance of killing one million colonists. Use of biological weapons incurs a major diplomatic penalty with all other races.
column2: 史上最先進的生化武器,有20%機率殺死100萬名移民。使用生物武器將對所有其他種族造成重大外交懲罰。

column1: Edible plants that grow anywhere, increasing the food output of all planets by +1 food per farmer, including worlds with 0 food output.
column2: 可在任何地方生長的可食用植物,使所有行星每位農夫的食物產量+1,即使是食物產量為0的世界亦適用。

column1: Creates an artificial black hole. The target ship is trapped in an intense gravity pocket and cannot move. Unless the generator or the equipped ship can be destroyed in 2 turns, the black hole will destroy the target.
column2: 製造人工黑洞。目標艦艇將被困於強大的重力陷阱中無法移動。除非在2回合內摧毀該發生器或裝備它的艦艇,否則黑洞將摧毀目標。

column1: Short range ships carrying a bomb that can be dropped on a planet or detonated on a ship. They carry one bomb each of the best type available. They move in groups of 4 at a speed of 10.
column2: 短程艦艇,可攜帶炸彈投擲於行星或在敵艦上引爆。每艘各攜帶一枚當前可用的最佳型炸彈。以4艘一組行動,速度10。

column1: The heart of your empire's government, the capitol is required to maintain proper order. Losing the colony that has the capitol building will have severe effects,  depending on your type of government. It can be rebuilt if destroyed,  but otherwise can not be built.
column2: 帝國政府的核心,首都建築是維持秩序所必需的。若失去擁有首都建築的殖民地,將依政體不同而產生嚴重後果。首都若遭摧毀可以重建,但在其他情況下無法建造。

column1: Protects ships from physical and energy attacks. Absorbs up to 5 times the ship's size in damage before failing, with each attack reduced by 1 point of damage. Regenerates 30% per combat turn.
column2: 保護艦艇免受物理與能量攻擊。可吸收相當於艦體大小5倍的傷害後才會失效,每次攻擊減免1點傷害。每個戰鬥回合恢復30%。

column1: Protects ships from physical and energy attacks. Absorbs up to 15 times the ship's size in damage before failing, with each attack reduced by 3 points of damage. Regenerates 30% per combat turn.
column2: 保護艦艇免受物理與能量攻擊。可吸收相當於艦體大小15倍的傷害後才會失效,每次攻擊減免3點傷害。每個戰鬥回合恢復30%。

column1: Protects ships from physical and energy attacks. Absorbs up to 25 times the ship's size in damage before failing, with each attack reduced by 5 points of damage. Regenerates 30% per combat turn.
column2: 保護艦艇免受物理與能量攻擊。可吸收相當於艦體大小25倍的傷害後才會失效,每次攻擊減免5點傷害。每個戰鬥回合恢復30%。

column1: Protects ships from physical and energy attacks. Absorbs up to 35 times the ship's size in damage before failing with each attack reduced by 7 points of damage. Regenerates 30% per combat turn.
column2: 保護艦艇免受物理與能量攻擊。可吸收相當於艦體大小35倍的傷害後才會失效,每次攻擊減免7點傷害。每個戰鬥回合恢復30%。

column1: Protects ships from physical and energy attacks. Absorbs up to 50 times the ship's size in damage before failing, with each attack reduced by 10 points of damage. Regenerates 30% per combat turn.
column2: 保護艦艇免受物理與能量攻擊。可吸收相當於艦體大小50倍的傷害後才會失效,每次攻擊減免10點傷害。每個戰鬥回合恢復30%。

column1: Completely hides a ship from long range scans. In combat, it adds +80 to the ship's beam defense and missiles have a 50% chance to miss as long as the ship does not attack. Must wait one turn without firing to recloak.
column2: 使艦艇完全躲過長程掃描。戰鬥中,只要艦艇不主動攻擊,光束防禦力+80,飛彈有50%機率失的。若要重新隱形,須有一回合不開火。

column1: Allows doctors to replace failing or damaged organs, increasing the population growth by +100K each turn as long as the current population is below the planetary maximum.
column2: 使醫師得以替換衰竭或受損的器官,只要目前人口低於行星上限,每回合人口成長+10萬。

column1: Creates a colony on another planet inside the same star system as the building colony.
column2: 在建造殖民地所在星系內的另一顆行星上建立殖民地。

column1: Capable of creating a colony in a distant star system. Will not engage in combat and will be destroyed when attacked if not escorted by a military ship.
column2: 能在遙遠星系建立殖民地。不會參與戰鬥,若無軍艦護航,遭受攻擊時將被摧毀。

column1: An advanced form of feudal government on a galactic scale. Eliminates automatic assimilation into enemy empires and reduces the cost of building ships to 1/3 normal costs.
column2: 銀河等級的進階封建政體。消除被敵方帝國自動同化的可能,並使艦艇建造成本降為正常值的三分之一。

column1: Provides a direct mental link to computers, allowing spies to circumvent many automated security systems. Adds +10 to all spy rolls.
column2: 提供與電腦直接連結的心靈介面,使間諜得以繞過多數自動化安全系統。所有間諜判定+10。

column1: Learns and adapts using a neural net similar to the biological brain. Equipped on all ships, it adds +100% chance to hit with beam weapons.  Attack bonuses are eliminated if the computer is damaged or destroyed.
column2: 運用類似生物腦的神經網路進行學習與調適。所有艦艇皆自動配備,光束武器命中率+100%。若電腦受損或被摧毀,此攻擊加成將消失。

column1: Surrounds a ship with an energy dampening field that reduces the damage a ship takes by 3/4. Has a 50% chance of distorting a transporter beam attempting to move troops onto the equipped ship, killing the troops instantly.
column2: 以能量阻尼力場包覆艦艇,使艦艇受到的傷害減少四分之三。對試圖將部隊傳送至此艦的傳送光束,有50%機率造成干擾,使部隊當場死亡。

column1: Provides friend-or-foe recognition guidance to missiles and torpedoes. They will retarget the nearest enemy ship if their first target is destroyed.
column2: 為飛彈與魚雷提供敵我辨識導引。若原目標被摧毀,將自動轉向攻擊最近的敵艦。

column1: Fires an intense beam of cosmic rays inflicting 50-100 points of damage. Any damage that penetrates the shields kills 1 marine unit for every 5 points of internal damage. Modifications: heavy mount, continuous.
column2: 發射強烈宇宙射線光束,造成50至100點傷害。凡穿透護盾的傷害,每5點艦內傷害將殺死1個陸戰隊單位。可改裝選項:重型底座、連續射擊。

column1: Engineered viruses that attack organic lifeforms. Introduced by orbital bombardment, each launch has a 10% chance to kill one million colonists. Use of biological  weapons incurs a major diplomatic penalty with all other races.
column2: 專為攻擊有機生命體設計的病毒,透過軌道轟炸投放,每次發射有10%機率殺死100萬名移民。使用生物武器將對所有其他種族造成重大外交懲罰。

column1: Allows miners to build stable tunnels deep into a planet. Generates 15  production and increases the productivity of each worker by +3 production each.
column2: 使礦工得以在行星深處挖掘穩固坑道。產生15點生產力,並使每位工人的生產力各+3。

column1: Take man-made toxic/polluting agents and store them deep within the surface of a planet, far below surface water supplies. Planetary pollution is completely  eliminated.
column2: 將人為毒性/污染物質儲存於行星地表深處,遠低於地表水源之下。行星污染將完全消除。

column1: Supplies sufficient energy to propel a ship up to 6 parsecs before refueling.
column2: 提供足夠能量,使艦艇在補給前可推進達6秒差距。

column1: Allows ships to cross into the dimension of the Antaran home world. To use it, select a fleet in the same system as the portal and press the 'Attack Antarans' button on the fleet pop-up.
column2: 使艦艇得以穿越至安塔蘭母星所在的空間維度。使用時,選取與傳送門位於同一星系的艦隊,並在艦隊視窗按下「攻擊安塔蘭人」按鈕。

column1: All weapons targeted against an equipped ship have a 30% chance of missing completely, regardless of any other considerations.
column2: 針對裝備此裝置的艦艇所發射的所有武器,一律有30%機率完全失的,不受其他因素影響。

column1: Fires intense bolts of energy that inflict 40 points of damage. Damage from  disrupter bolts is not reduced by range. Modifications: autofire, heavy mount.
column2: 發射強烈能量彈,造成40點傷害。擾亂彈的傷害不受射程影響而衰減。可改裝選項:自動射擊、重型底座。

column1: Mobile planetoid bases. They are the largest ships that can be built.
column2: 可移動的小行星基地。是可建造的最大型艦艇。

column1: Triples the structural integrity of a ship and provides more protection for the ship's drive system, tripling the amount of damage required to destroy it.
column2: 使艦艇結構強度提高為三倍,並加強對引擎系統的防護,將摧毀引擎所需的傷害量提高為三倍。

column1: Creates a magnetic pulse jamming both weapon tracking systems and missile guidance units, adding +70% to the ship's missile evasion.
column2: 產生磁性脈衝,同時干擾武器追蹤系統與飛彈導引裝置,使艦艇飛彈迴避率+70%。

column1: Directs starship weapons' fire and is automatically equipped on all ships, increasing chance to hit by +25%. This bonus is lost if the computer is damaged or destroyed.
column2: 導引星艦武器射擊,自動配備於所有艦艇,命中率+25%。若電腦受損或被摧毀,此加成將消失。

column1: Tracks the warp signature of a vehicle. If the missile penetrates the shields, all damage is applied to the ship's drive, bypassing any armor. Requires 4 times the space and costs 4 times more than regular missiles.
column2: 追蹤艦艇的曲速訊號。若飛彈穿透護盾,所有傷害將直接作用於艦艇引擎,無視裝甲防護。所需空間為一般飛彈的4倍,成本亦為4倍。

column1: One quarter of all damage inflicted on a ship is instead stored in the  energy absorber.  The ship must fire this stored energy at an enemy ship in the next turn or it is lost.
column2: 艦艇所受傷害的四分之一將轉存於能量吸收器中。該艦艇須於下一回合將所儲存能量發射至敵艦,否則能量將會消失。

column1: Enables a colony to better control environmental conditions, allowing  colonization of the more intolerable areas of the planet. Maximum planetary population is increased by +2 million.
column2: 使殖民地得以更妥善控制環境條件,得以殖民行星上環境更惡劣的地區。行星最大人口上限+200萬。

column1: Allows you to mutate your race, altering their abilities. When evolutionary mutation is researched, you may choose 4 additional points of race development picks, to either remove disadvantages or increase advantages.
column2: 使你得以突變種族,改變其能力。研發出演化突變科技後,可額外選擇4點種族發展點數,用於移除劣勢或增加優勢。

column1: Increase the overall range of a ship by +50%, but at the cost of a considerable amount of space.
column2: 使艦艇整體射程+50%,但需耗費相當可觀的空間。

column1: Allow a ship to fire two volleys of missiles in one turn. Will only fire one per turn after that, unless the ship takes one full turn without firing missiles to reload.
column2: 使艦艇得以在一回合內發射兩輪飛彈齊射。此後每回合僅能發射一輪,除非該艦有一整回合不發射飛彈以完成重新裝填。

column1: Advanced form of Democracy. The research and income bonus is increased to +75%.
column2: 進階版民主政體。研究與收入加成提高至+75%。

column1: Allows a ship to carry a group of 4 short-range fighters. They carry one beam  weapon of the best type that can have the point defense modification, and can  fire it 4 times before returning to the launching ship.
column2: 使艦艇得以搭載一組4架短程戰鬥機。每架配備一門可加裝近迫防禦改裝的最佳型光束武器,可發射4次後返回母艦。

column1: Planetary base that houses 10-interceptors.  Fighter garrisons are equipped  with 6-bomber, or 4-heavy fighter squadrons when the appropriate technology becomes available. New fighters become available every 10 combat turns.
column2: 可容納10架攔截機的行星基地。當對應科技可用時,戰機駐防隊將換裝為6架轟炸機或4架重型戰鬥機中隊。每10個戰鬥回合可獲得新戰機補充。

column1: Alter the molecular structure of inorganic material to create edible food. Having a facility in a colony allows you to convert 2 units of production (energy) into 1 unit of food, as needed by the colony.
column2: 改變無機物質的分子結構以製造可食用食物。殖民地內若建有此設施,可依需求將2單位生產力(能量)轉換為1單位食物。

column1: A group of ships to transport food or colonists as needed between worlds. Each fleet contains 5 freighters. The fleet can transport 5 food units or one population unit per turn.
column2: 一組依需求於各世界間運送食物或移民的艦隊。每支艦隊包含5艘貨船,每回合可運送5單位食物或1單位人口。

column1: Projects a tetrium stream of charged particles, inflicting 2-6 points of damage Modifications: heavy mount, continuous, point defense, enveloping.
column2: 投射帶電四級粒子流,造成2至6點傷害。可改裝選項:重型底座、連續射擊、近迫防禦、包覆彈頭。

column1: A high-yield orbital bombardment device engineered to destroy ground forces and colony installations, inflicting 4-24 points of damage.
column2: 高當量軌道轟炸裝置,專為摧毀地面部隊與殖民地設施而設計,造成4至24點傷害。

column1: Capable of faster than light travel, moving a ship 3 parsecs a turn. All ship  drives are automatically upgraded when this technology is discovered.
column2: 具備超光速航行能力,使艦艇每回合可移動3秒差距。此科技一經發現,所有艦艇引擎將自動升級。

column1: A powerful hand-held rifle that increases the combat rating of militia, troops, and armor by +10. The bonus is not cumulative with other rifles.
column2: 威力強大的手持步槍,使民兵、部隊與裝甲單位戰鬥力+10。此加成不與其他步槍疊加。

column1: Creates an environment suited to both plant and animal growth by introducing genetically-engineered microorganisms into the world. Can only be applied to terran environments.
column2: 藉由將基因工程微生物引入世界,創造適合動植物生長的環境。僅能用於陸地型環境。

column1: Eliminates the need for hard currency, replacing it with instantaneous electronic exchanges. Increases the money generated by all colonies by +50%.
column2: 消除對實體貨幣的需求,以即時電子交易取代之。使所有殖民地的金錢收入+50%。

column1: Nearly instantaneous galaxy-wide communications, allowing quick exchange of information and ideas. The cybernet generates 15 research points and each scientist generates +3 research each.
column2: 近乎即時的銀河通訊網路,使資訊與構想得以迅速交流。網控中心產生15點研究點數,並使每位科學家的研究產出各+3。

column1: Connects all beings within the race in a collective consciousness, allowing each to act in total harmony.  Farmer and worker production is increased by +100%. Only races that began with unification can research it.
column2: 將該種族所有個體連結於集體意識中,使彼此行動完全協調一致。農夫與工人的產出+100%。只有以「統一」起始的種族才能研發此科技。

column1: An extremely powerful linear accelerator which inflicts 18 points of damage regardless of range. Modifications: autofire, armor piercing, heavy mount.
column2: 威力極強的線性加速器,不論射程遠近均造成18點傷害。可改裝選項:自動射擊、穿甲彈頭、重型底座。

column1: Gravitic waves that tear a target apart. Inflicts 3-15 points of damage. Any damage penetrating the ship's shields inflicts extra structural damage. Modifications: heavy mount, continuous.
column2: 撕裂目標的重力波,造成3至15點傷害。凡穿透艦艇護盾的傷害,將額外造成結構損傷。可改裝選項:重型底座、連續射擊。

column1: Creates a sudden rift in a ship's subspace field. Weakens the inertial controls of the ship, spinning it in random directions, inflicting 1-4 points of structural damage times the ship's size class. Range is 15 squares.
column2: 在艦艇的次空間力場中製造突發性裂隙。削弱艦艇的慣性控制,使其朝隨機方向旋轉,造成相當於艦體等級1至4倍的結構傷害。射程15格。

column1: Reduces the damage of any attack by an additional 3 points. Allows operation of all shields in a nebula and prevents the use of enemy transporters even after  shields have been dropped. Immune to shield-piercing weapons.
column2: 使任何攻擊所受傷害額外減少3點。使護盾得以在星雲中正常運作,並在護盾失效後仍能阻止敵方使用傳送器。對穿盾武器免疫。

column1: Heavy armor negates armor piercing effects and reinforces the armor of a ship, tripling the amount of damage the armor can absorb.
column2: 重型裝甲可抵銷穿甲效果並強化艦艇裝甲,使裝甲可吸收的傷害量提高為三倍。

column1: Allow ships to carry heavy fighters equipped with 2 of the best point defense  beam weapons and 2 of the best bombs available. They have 5 hits, modified by your best armor, and move at speed 12.
column2: 使艦艇得以搭載重型戰鬥機,每架配備2門最佳型近迫防禦光束武器與2枚最佳型炸彈。可承受5次命中(依所用最佳裝甲調整),移動速度12。

column1: Through genetic engineering, the average intelligence of the entire race is substantially improved, increasing the research of all scientists by +1.
column2: 透過基因工程,大幅提升整個種族的平均智力,使所有科學家的研究產出+1。

column1: Allows a ship to channel the fire of its energy weapons more efficiently, increasing damage by +50% over base regardless of range. It does not improve the chances of hitting distant targets.
column2: 使艦艇得以更有效地聚集能量武器火力,不論射程遠近,傷害均較基礎值+50%。不會提升對遠距目標的命中率。

column1: Capable of creating realistic 3-D images from holographic projections. Increases a planet's morale by +20%.
column2: 能以全息投影製造逼真的立體影像。使行星士氣+20%。

column1: An automated, sealed environment in which food can be grown, even on lifeless worlds. It increases the food output of a world by +2 food.
column2: 自動化密閉環境,即使在毫無生命的世界也能種植食物。使該世界食物產量+2。

column1: Capable of moving a ship 6 parsecs a turn. All ship drives are automatically  upgraded when this technology is discovered.
column2: 使艦艇每回合可移動6秒差距。此科技一經發現,所有艦艇引擎將自動升級。

column1: Conduct and magnify energy transmission in less space, giving a ship more space for equipment. Increases the amount of equipment it can carry by +25%. Megafluxers  are used automatically on all ships once acquired.
column2: 以更小空間傳導並放大能量傳輸,使艦艇獲得更多裝備空間。可搭載裝備量+25%。一旦取得,超導通量器將自動用於所有艦艇。

column1: Allow ship beam weapons to fire twice in a turn. After firing twice, one turn must be spent without firing beam weapons; otherwise the weapons can only fire once per turn.
column2: 使艦艇光束武器得以於一回合內發射兩次。連續發射兩次後,須有一回合不發射光束武器,否則武器每回合僅能發射一次。

column1: Allow you to communicate with any ship already in hyperspace so you can change its destination. Increases the command points of star bases, battle stations and star fortresses by +3 points.
column2: 使你得以與已進入超空間的艦艇通訊,藉此變更其目的地。使星際基地、戰鬥站與星際要塞的指揮點數各+3。

column1: Advanced form of dictatorship. Total command points generated are increased by +50% and all defensive spy rolls are at +20.
column2: 進階版獨裁政體。產生的總指揮點數+50%,所有防禦性間諜判定+20。

column1: Creates a warp field that can operate in normal space. Increases ship mobility and makes it harder to target. Adds +100 to the ship's beam defense, and allows it to change direction without movement cost.
column2: 產生可於正常空間中運作的曲速力場。提升艦艇機動性,使其更難被鎖定。光束防禦力+100,並使其得以在不耗費移動力的情況下變換方向。

column1: Creates a partial warp field that can operate in normal space. It vastly  improves the ship's mobility and makes it considerably harder to target, adding +50 to ship's beam defense and halving movement cost for turning.
column2: 產生可於正常空間中運作的局部曲速力場。大幅提升艦艇機動性,使其更難被鎖定,光束防禦力+50,並使轉向所需移動力減半。

column1: Capable of moving a ship 7 parsecs a turn. All ship drives are automatically  upgraded when this technology is discovered.
column2: 使艦艇每回合可移動7秒差距。此科技一經發現,所有艦艇引擎將自動升級。

column1: Capable of moving a ship 4 parsecs a turn. All ship drives are automatically  upgraded when this technology is discovered.
column2: 使艦艇每回合可移動4秒差距。此科技一經發現,所有艦艇引擎將自動升級。

column1: Fires a particle wave that overloads ships' systems and inflicts 2-10 points of  damage, bypassing all armor and structure. Completely ineffective against  monsters and Antaran ships. Modifications: autofire, and continuous.
column2: 發射使艦艇系統過載的粒子波,造成2至10點傷害,無視所有裝甲與結構。對怪獸與安塔蘭艦艇完全無效。可改裝選項:自動射擊、連續射擊。

column1: Supplies sufficient energy to propel a ship 9 parsecs before refueling.
column2: 提供足夠能量,使艦艇在補給前可推進達9秒差距。

column1: Forms a controlled wormhole between two points, increasing the speed of ships moving through it by 3 parsecs a turn. Once discovered, all colonies will automatically be equipped with one.
column2: 在兩點間形成受控蟲洞,使通過的艦艇每回合移動速度+3秒差距。一經發現,所有殖民地將自動配備。

column1: Highly focused, coherent beams of light which deliver 1-4 points of damage. Modifications: autofire, armor piercing, heavy mount, continuous, point defense, no range dissipation.
column2: 高度聚焦的同調光束,造成1至4點傷害。可改裝選項:自動射擊、穿甲彈頭、重型底座、連續射擊、近迫防禦、射程不衰減。

column1: A hand-held weapon that increases the combat rating of militia, troops, and armor by +5. The bonus is not cumulative with other rifles.
column2: 手持武器,使民兵、部隊與裝甲單位戰鬥力+5。此加成不與其他步槍疊加。

column1: Surrounds a ship in a powerful energized field capable of overloading the targeting system of any missile, torpedo or fighter. Has a 50% chance of destroying these weapons before they damage the ship.
column2: 以強大能量力場包覆艦艇,可使任何飛彈、魚雷或戰鬥機的鎖定系統過載。有50%機率在傷害艦艇前將這些武器摧毀。

column1: Lets the colony train troops for ground invasion protection. Begins with 4 marine units, then trains 1 unit every 5 turns, up to the planet's maximum population. Eliminates morale penalties for dictatorships and feudal governments.
column2: 使殖民地得以訓練部隊以防禦地面入侵。初始擁有4個陸戰隊單位,之後每5回合訓練1個單位,上限為該行星的最大人口。消除獨裁與封建政體的士氣懲罰。

column1: A rail gun firing a hyper-velocity projectile. Inflicts 6 points of damage. Damage is not reduced by range. Modifications: autofire, armor piercing, heavy mount, point defense.
column2: 發射超高速彈體的軌道砲。造成6點傷害,傷害不受射程影響而衰減。可改裝選項:自動射擊、穿甲彈頭、重型底座、近迫防禦。

column1: Fires a bolt of pure energy that always hits. Inflicts 100 points of damage, but with double the range penalties for dissipation. Modifications: heavy mount.
column2: 發射必定命中的純能量彈。造成100點傷害,但射程衰減懲罰加倍。可改裝選項:重型底座。

column1: Carries a powerful, chemically-based explosive warhead capable of delivering 14 points of damage. Modifications: MIRV, emissions guidance, fast, armored, and ECCM.
column2: 攜帶威力強大的化學爆炸彈頭,可造成14點傷害。可改裝選項:多目標分導(MIRV)、能量訊號導引、高速、裝甲強化、電子反反制(ECCM)。

column1: Microorganisms used to create drugs. Increases the population growth rate of all planets by +25% and halves the percentage chance for death spores and bio-terminators to kill colonists.
column2: 用於製造藥物的微生物。使所有行星人口成長率+25%,並使死亡孢子與生物終結者殺死移民的機率減半。

column1: Uses microscopic nano-machines to construct buildings and ships with less metal, but with the same strength and durability. Increases productivity of all workers by +1 production.
column2: 運用微型奈米機械,以較少金屬建造建築與艦艇,同時維持相同的強度與耐用性。使所有工人的生產力各+1。

column1: Capable of creating an outpost on any uninhabited planet. Outposts function like a colony, except no population units may be moved there. Outpost ships are unarmed and will be destroyed if not escorted by military ships.
column2: 能在任何無人行星上建立前哨站。前哨站的運作方式與殖民地相同,但無法遷入人口單位。前哨艦不具武裝,若無軍艦護航,將遭摧毀。

column1: Directs all starship weapon fire, adding +125% to the chance to hit. If the computer is destroyed, the ship loses the bonus.
column2: 導引星艦所有武器射擊,命中率+125%。若電腦被摧毀,該艦將失去此加成。

column1: Jamming frequencies across the entire spectrum this device adds +100 to the ships missile evasion rating.
column2: 干擾全頻譜訊號,使艦艇飛彈迴避率+100。

column1: Allow ships to rapidly change the frequency of their shields, increasing the maximum strength by +50%.
column2: 使艦艇得以快速改變護盾頻率,使護盾最大強度+50%。

column1: Microscopic nano-machines capable of breaking down environmental contaminants. Doubles the number of production units a planet can produce before any pollution is created.
column2: 能分解環境污染物的微型奈米機械。使行星在產生污染前可累積的生產力單位數量加倍。

column1: With improved data processing methods, the pathways of the brain can be mapped and analyzed. Provides a near perfect lie detector used by spies to elicit information, adding +10 to all spy rolls.
column2: 藉由改良的資料處理方法,得以繪製並分析腦部神經路徑。為間諜提供近乎完美的測謊裝置以取得情報,所有間諜判定+10。

column1: Fires an intense beam of lethal radiation. Inflicts 3-12 points of damage to shields. Any damage that penetrates the shields kills 1 marine unit for every 5 points of internal damage. Modifications: heavy mount, continuous.
column2: 發射強烈致命輻射光束,對護盾造成3至12點傷害。凡穿透護盾的傷害,每5點艦內傷害將殺死1個陸戰隊單位。可改裝選項:重型底座、連續射擊。

column1: Detects enemy ships. Has a base detection range of 5 parsecs. Ships in transit can be detected at 1 parsec per size class of ship greater range. Neutron scanners  reduce enemy ship's missile evasion by -40.
column2: 偵測敵艦。基礎偵測範圍為5秒差距。航行中的艦艇,每提高一個艦體等級可再增加1秒差距的偵測範圍。中子掃描器使敵艦飛彈迴避率-40。

column1: Ships with this armor have 6 times the base structure and armor points. The hit points of fighters are multiplied by 5. Adds +20 to ground troop combat strengths.
column2: 裝備此裝甲的艦艇,其基礎結構值與裝甲值提高為6倍。戰鬥機的生命值提高為5倍。地面部隊戰鬥力+20。

column1: A high-yield orbital bombardment device engineered to destroy ground forces and colony installations, inflicting 10-60 points of damage.
column2: 高當量軌道轟炸裝置,專為摧毀地面部隊與殖民地設施而設計,造成10至60點傷害。

column1: A high-yield orbital bombardment device engineered to destroy ground forces and colony installations, inflicting 3-12 points of damage.
column2: 高當量軌道轟炸裝置,專為摧毀地面部隊與殖民地設施而設計,造成3至12點傷害。

column1: Capable of moving a ship 2 parsecs per turn. This is the first ship drive that makes interstellar travel possible.
column2: 使艦艇每回合可移動2秒差距。這是第一種使星際航行成為可能的艦艇引擎。

column1: Carries a high-yield nuclear warhead that inflicts 8 points of damage.  Modifications: MIRV, emissions guidance, fast, heavily armored and ECCM.
column2: 攜帶高當量核子彈頭,造成8點傷害。可改裝選項:多目標分導(MIRV)、能量訊號導引、高速、重型裝甲強化、電子反反制(ECCM)。

column1: Directs all starship weapons fire, adding +50 to the chance to hit. Bonus is lost if the computer is destroyed.
column2: 導引星艦所有武器射擊,命中率+50。若電腦被摧毀,此加成將消失。

column1: Fires a stream of matter in a focused energy beam that is naturally shield piercing,  and inflicts 10-30 points of damage. Modifications: continous, heavy mount, and  point defense.
column2: 以聚焦能量光束發射物質流,天生具備穿盾能力,造成10至30點傷害。可改裝選項:連續射擊、重型底座、近迫防禦。

column1: Deflects physical and energy attacks, increasing the combat rating of militia, troops and armor by +20.
column2: 偏折物理與能量攻擊,使民兵、部隊與裝甲單位戰鬥力+20。

column1: A derivative of a subspace teleporter that allows the equipped ship to teleport itself or another ship 18 squares in combat.
column2: 次空間傳送器的衍生裝置,使裝備此裝置的艦艇得以在戰鬥中將自身或另一艘艦艇傳送18格。

column1: Allows a ship to temporarily enter another dimension instead of just visually disappearing. While cloaked, the ship cannot be detected or attacked. Can only function for 10 turns, after which it will act like an ordinary cloaking device.
column2: 使艦艇得以暫時進入另一維度,而非僅是視覺上消失。隱形期間,該艦無法被偵測或攻擊。此功能僅可持續10回合,之後將如同一般隱形裝置運作。

column1: Fires a trans-warp beam of phased energy that actually exists in several dimensions simultaneously, inflicting 5-20 points of damage. Modifications: autofire, continuous, heavy mount, point defense, shield piercing.
column2: 發射超曲速相位能量光束,實際上同時存在於多個維度之中,造成5至20點傷害。可改裝選項:自動射擊、連續射擊、重型底座、近迫防禦、穿盾。

column1: A hand held rifle that can almost disintegrate an opponent with one blast, increasing the combat rating of militia, troops and armor by +20. The bonus is not cumulative with other rifles.
column2: 手持步槍,一擊幾乎可將對手瓦解,使民兵、部隊與裝甲單位戰鬥力+20。此加成不與其他步槍疊加。

column1: Seals a planet in an energy field. Converts Radiated climates to Barren climates. Reduces damage against a planet by 20 points. Ground troops and biological weapons cannot pass.
column2: 以能量力場封閉行星。將輻射氣候轉變為貧瘠氣候。使行星所受傷害減少20點。地面部隊與生物武器均無法穿透。

column1: Seals planet in an energy field. Converts Radiated climates into Barren. Reduces damage against the planet 10 points. It replaces any planetary radiation shield already built.
column2: 以能量力場封閉行星。將輻射氣候轉變為貧瘠氣候。使行星所受傷害減少10點。取代任何已建造的行星輻射護盾。

column1: Creates artificial gravity to normalize a planet to standard gravity limits. Gravity generators eliminate the negative effects of low and heavy gravity fields.
column2: 產生人工重力,使行星重力恢復至標準範圍。重力產生器可消除低重力與高重力場的負面效果。

column1: Contains 300 space units of your best missiles, with unlimited ammo.
column2: 內含300空間單位的最佳型飛彈,彈藥無限。

column1: Ground installation that contains 300 space units of heavy mount and point defense  versions of the best available beam weapons.
column2: 地面設施,內含300空間單位的最佳型光束武器(重型底座與近迫防禦版本)。

column1: Reduces solar and cosmic bombardment so lifeforms can comfortably move about the surface. Radiated climates become Barren.  Reduces damage against a planet by 5 points.
column2: 減少太陽與宇宙輻射轟擊,使生命體得以在地表舒適活動。輻射氣候轉為貧瘠氣候。使行星所受傷害減少5點。

column1: Increases the revenues earned on a planet by +100%.
column2: 使行星收入+100%。

column1: Supplies researchers with a vast amount of information. Generates 10 research  points and increases the research each scientist produces by +2.
column2: 提供研究人員大量資訊。產生10點研究點數,並使每位科學家的研究產出各+2。

column1: Fires a blast of plasma energy inflicting 6-30 points of damage to all 4 shields of  the target. Only focuses well over a short range, doubling all range penalties.  Modifications: heavy mount, and continuous fire.
column2: 發射電漿能量爆,對目標全部4面護盾各造成6至30點傷害。僅在短射程內能良好聚焦,所有射程懲罰加倍。可改裝選項:重型底座、連續射擊。

column1: The most powerful held weapon, increasing the combat rating of militia, troops, and armor by +30. The bonus is not cumulative with other rifle bonuses.
column2: 威力最強的手持武器,使民兵、部隊與裝甲單位戰鬥力+30。此加成不與其他步槍加成疊加。

column1: Plasma warhead capable of 120 points of damage. Travels with a combat speed of 24, losing 5 points of strength for each square traveled and firing every other turn.  Modifications: overloaded, enveloping, ECCM, no range dissipation.
column2: 電漿彈頭,可造成120點傷害。以戰鬥速度24飛行,每飛行一格威力減少5點,每隔一回合發射一次。可改裝選項:超載彈頭、包覆彈頭、電子反反制(ECCM)、射程不衰減。

column1: An energy web that envelopes a target within a 15 square range. Inflicts 5-25  points of damage per turn. This damage persists, dissipating at a rate of  5 points per turn.
column2: 一種能量網,可涵蓋目標周圍 15 格範圍。每回合造成 5-25 點傷害,傷害會持續存在,並以每回合 5 點的速度遞減。

column1: The ultimate in virtual holographic entertainment, creating completely immersive entertainment environments. It increases morale by +30% and is  cumulative with holo simulator.
column2: 虛擬全像娛樂的極致之作,打造完全沉浸式的娛樂環境。使士氣提高 +30%,且可與全像模擬器的效果疊加。

column1: Uses advanced chemicals to process factory waste. Only half of  the actual production of the planet used to calculate pollution.
column2: 運用先進化學藥劑處理工廠廢棄物。計算污染程度時,只採計行星實際產量的一半。

column1: Directs all ship beam weapons fire, adding a +75% chance to hit.  If the computer is damaged or destroyed, the ship loses the attack bonus.
column2: 統合艦上所有光束武器的射擊,提供 +75% 命中機率加成。若此裝置受損或被摧毀,艦艇將失去此攻擊加成。

column1: Provides troops with superior power and mobility by mechanically magnifying their natural strength. Powered armor equipped troops have a +10 bonus to their combat rating and take +1 hits to kill.
column2: 以機械方式放大部隊的天生力量,賦予其優越的力量與機動性。配備動力裝甲的部隊戰鬥評等 +10,且須多擊中 +1 次才能將其擊殺。

column1: Hand-held weapon that fires high-velocity projectiles.
column2: 發射高速彈丸的手持武器。

column1: Energy projectiles traveling at trans-warp speed, striking their target the turn they are fired. They inflict 40 points of damage. Can be fired every other turn, with a max range of 24 squares. Modifications: overloaded, enveloping, ECCM.
column2: 以超曲速飛行的能量射彈,發射當回合即可命中目標,造成 40 點傷害。每隔一回合可發射一次,最大射程 24 格。可用改造:超載、包覆、反反制。

column1: Allows you to create psychic beings of immense power. Spying bonuses are raised by +10. Morale on all planets is increased by 10% for dictatorships and imperium government.
column2: 使你能夠創造出力量驚人的靈能生物。間諜加成提高 +10。獨裁制與帝制政府下,所有行星的士氣提高 10%。

column1: When fired, causes violent vibrations in ships, missiles and fighters adjacent to the equipped ships. Inflicts 2-24 points of damage per size class of the ship damaged.
column2: 發射時,會使裝備艦艇周圍相鄰的艦艇、飛彈與戰機產生劇烈震動,依受損艦艇的體型等級造成每級 2-24 點傷害。

column1: Carries a powerful high-energy pulse capable of delivering 20 points of damage. Modifications: MIRV, emissions guidance, fast, armored, and ECCM.
column2: 搭載強力高能脈衝彈頭,可造成 20 點傷害。可用改造:多彈頭、輻射導引、快速、重裝甲與反反制。

column1: Creates an interphase reaction when the ship is destroyed or self destructs, tripling the destructive power of the ship's explosion.  Ships equipped with  a quantum detonator have a 50% chance to self-destruct when captured.
column2: 艦艇被摧毀或自毀時會引發交相反應,使爆炸的破壞力提升為三倍。裝備量子引爆器的艦艇在被俘獲時,有 50% 機率自毀。

column1: Corrects for long-range targeting inaccuracies, the actual range is  divided by three for purposes of to-hit bonuses only.
column2: 修正長距離瞄準的誤差,在計算命中率加成時,實際射程會除以三計算。

column1: Allows scrap material reuse, reducing construction costs. Every unit of population generates +1 production. This increase does not count toward the planetary pollution level.
column2: 使廢料材料得以回收再利用,降低建造成本。每單位人口額外產生 +1 生產力,此增量不計入行星污染程度。

column1: Subspace field that reflects beam weapons back on the attacker. Chance to reflect is the ratio of reflection field strength of 10 to the sum of weapon attack damage and reflection field strength.
column2: 一種可將光束武器反射回攻擊者的次空間力場。反射機率為反射場強度 10 與武器攻擊傷害加上反射場強度總和的比值。

column1: Builds mechanical workers that add production dependent on a colony's mineral resources 5, 8, 10, 15 or 20.
column2: 建造機械工人,依殖民地的礦產資源等級增加生產力,分別為 5、8、10、15 或 20。

column1: Houses state-of-the-art computer equipment, creating a superior research environment. Generates 5 research points and increases the research each  scientist produces by +1.
column2: 配置最先進的電腦設備,打造優越的研究環境。產生 5 點研究,並使每位科學家產生的研究 +1。

column1: Automate many difficult tasks, increasing the productivity of industrial workers. Generates 10 production and increases the production each worker  produces by +2.
column2: 將許多繁重工作自動化,提高工業工人的生產力。產生 10 點生產力,並使每位工人產生的生產力 +2。

column1: Detects enemy ships. Base detection range is 1 parsec. Ships in transit can  be detected 1 parsec further per size class of ship.
column2: 偵測敵方艦艇。基礎偵測範圍為 1 秒差距,航行中的艦艇每提升一個體型等級,可額外多偵測 1 秒差距。

column1: A computer assisted laboratory that generates an amount of research dependent on ship size: 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, or 32. Also adds +10 per size class to the attack roll of all ships in a fleet fighting space monsters or Antarans.
column2: 電腦輔助實驗室,依艦艇體型產生研究:1、2、4、8、16 或 32。此外,艦隊與太空怪獸或安塔蘭人交戰時,依體型等級為艦隊所有艦艇的攻擊骰加成 +10。

column1: Automatically controls and monitors vital sections of ship, attacking intruders with computer-controlled weapons. Adds +20 to the combat rolls of marines when defending against enemy boarders.
column2: 自動控制並監控艦艇的重要區域,以電腦控制武器攻擊入侵者。防禦敵方登艦部隊時,使陸戰隊的戰鬥骰加成 +20。

column1: Detects enemy ships. Has a base detection range of 8 parsecs.  Ships in transit can be detected 1 parsec further per size class of ship. Sensors reduce enemy  ship's missile evasion by -70.
column2: 偵測敵方艦艇。基礎偵測範圍為 8 秒差距,航行中的艦艇每提升一個體型等級,可額外多偵測 1 秒差距。此感測器使敵艦的飛彈迴避降低 -70。

column1: Increases the recharge rate of ship shields by +70% of their maximum strength.
column2: 使艦艇護盾的充能速率提高,達其最大強度的 +70%。

column1: Using nano-machines, planetary soil can be molecularly enriched and fertilized, increasing the food a farmer can harvest by +1. Soil enrichment will not work in barren, radiated, and toxic planets.
column2: 運用奈米機械,以分子層級強化並施肥行星土壤,使每位農民可收成的食物增加 +1。土壤強化對貧瘠、輻射與有毒行星無效。

column1: Trains ship crews, adding 1 to their starting level. Ships stationed in the system gain 2 experience each turn.
column2: 訓練艦艇船員,使其起始等級 +1。駐留於該星系的艦艇每回合獲得 2 點經驗值。

column1: Site for commercial transactions, increasing the money generation of a colony by +50%.
column2: 商業交易場所,使殖民地的星幣產出增加 +50%。

column1: Creates an instantaneous subspace distortion in a 2-square radius about the equipped ship.  Everything in the area sustains 4-32 structural hits times its size class, ignoring shields.
column2: 在裝備艦艇周圍 2 格半徑範圍內,產生瞬間的次空間扭曲。範圍內所有目標無視護盾,依其體型等級承受 4-32 點結構傷害。

column1: Trains a number of spies that you can either use as defensive agents or active spies to steal technology or sabotage enemy installations.
column2: 訓練若干名間諜,可作為防禦性探員,或派往刺探科技、破壞敵方設施的主動間諜任務。

column1: Supplies sufficient energy to propel a ship 4 parsecs before refueling.
column2: 提供足夠能量,使艦艇在需要補給前可航行 4 秒差距。

column1: Armed orbital platforms used to service military ships.  They are equipped with extensive weaponry, the best available scanner with a +2 scanning range bonus and a star dock capable of building ships larger than destroyers.
column2: 武裝軌道平台,用於維護軍用艦艇。配備大量武裝、當前可用的最佳掃描器(掃描範圍 +2 加成),以及可建造大於驅逐艦體型艦艇的星際船塢。

column1: A large military orbital platform. Has a +6 parsec scan range bonus and adds +20% to both the offense and defense of all ships in combat around it. Replaces battlestations and star bases.
column2: 大型軍用軌道平台。掃描範圍 +6 秒差距加成,並使周圍交戰的所有艦艇攻防各提高 +20%。可取代戰鬥站與星際基地。

column1: Allows instantaneous movement between any of your colonies. All colonies are automatically equipped with one once the technology is researched.
column2: 使你的殖民地之間可瞬間移動。此科技研發完成後,所有殖民地將自動配備星際之門。

column1: Places target in suspended animation. It cannot fire, recharge weapons, cloak or be attacked. Field has a 3-square range and will hold the  target ship until the stasis field is turned off or destroyed.
column2: 使目標陷入假死狀態,無法開火、為武器充能、隱形或遭受攻擊。此力場射程為 3 格,會持續拘束目標艦艇,直到停滯場關閉或被摧毀為止。

column1: Reduces the gravitic emissions from FTL drives. Ships equipped with stealth fields can not be detected at any range on the main screen.
column2: 降低超光速引擎的重力輻射。裝備匿蹤場的艦艇在主畫面上,無論距離多遠皆無法被偵測到。

column1: Renders a person virtually invisible, blending the wearer into the background. Adds +10 all spy rolls.
column2: 使穿戴者幾近隱形,與背景融為一體。使所有間諜骰加成 +10。

column1: A plasma cannon that can be mounted on a ship or a planet. Automatically inflicts 400 hits to all shields of any ship, regardless of range and defense. Completely destroys a planet when used for orbital bombardment.
column2: 可安裝於艦艇或行星上的電漿砲。無論射程與防禦為何,皆自動對任何艦艇的所有護盾造成 400 點傷害。用於軌道轟炸時,可徹底摧毀一顆行星。

column1: Links to ship's weapons array to more accurately choose target's weak armor points. All damage that penetrates the target's shields is doubled.
column2: 連結艦艇武器陣列,更精確地鎖定目標裝甲的弱點。所有穿透目標護盾的傷害皆加倍。

column1: Allows you to issue orders to any ship within 6 squares of a star system with a starbase, battlestation, or star fortress. Increases the command points given by a base by +2 points.
column2: 使你能對星際基地、戰鬥站或星際要塞所在星系周圍 6 格內的任何艦艇下達指令。並使基地提供的指揮點數增加 +2 點。

column1: Allows a ship to execute a hyperspace jump of up to 20 squares. The jump does not change the ship's direction; it must rotate normally to change facing.
column2: 使艦艇能執行最遠 20 格的超空間躍遷。躍遷不會改變艦艇的朝向,須以正常方式轉向才能改變面向。

column1: An underground cavern system of automated farms. Increases the food output of a planet by +4.
column2: 地底洞穴系統中的自動化農場。使行星的食物產出增加 +4。

column1: Provide suspended animation facilities for legendary officers if their ship is destroyed. At least one friendly ship must survive the combat to rescue any  surviving officers.
column2: 艦艇被摧毀時,為傳奇軍官提供假死保存設施。須有至少一艘友軍艦艇在戰鬥中存活,才能救出倖存的軍官。

column1: Integrated into star bases, battlestations and star fortresses. Emits  signals which penetrate hyperspace. Ships within 3 parsecs can receive your orders.  Increases the command points of these bases by +1.
column2: 整合於星際基地、戰鬥站與星際要塞中,發射能穿透超空間的訊號。3 秒差距內的艦艇皆可接收你的指令,並使這些基地的指揮點數增加 +1。

column1: Detect enemy ships. Has a base detection range of 3 parsecs. Ships in transit  can be detected 1 parsec further per size class of ship. Tachyon scanners reduce enemy ship's missile evasion by -20.
column2: 偵測敵方艦艇。基礎偵測範圍為 3 秒差距,航行中的艦艇每提升一個體型等級,可額外多偵測 1 秒差距。快子掃描器使敵艦的飛彈迴避降低 -20。

column1: Develops the talents of naturally telepathic members of your race. Enables you to form a more effective police force with an ability to get at the truth in a new way. Adds +5% to all spying rolls.
column2: 培養你的種族中天生具心靈感應能力者的才能,使你能組建更有效率的治安部隊,以嶄新的方式洞悉真相。使所有間諜骰加成 +5%。

column1: Makes a planet more hospitable. Barren becomes desert or tundra, deserts become arid, tundras become swamp, oceans, swamps and arid become terran. Each use on  a planet increases cost by 250 production.
column2: 使行星更加宜居。貧瘠行星轉變為沙漠或凍原,沙漠轉變為乾旱,凍原轉變為沼澤,海洋、沼澤與乾旱行星轉變為陸棲。每對同一顆行星使用一次,費用增加 250 點生產力。

column1: Advanced fuel system that self-regenerates, providing all ships with an unlimited fuel supply and range.
column2: 先進的自我再生燃料系統,為所有艦艇提供無限的燃料供應與航程。

column1: Allows a ship to shift in and out of the time-space continuum, enabling it to take an additional turn at the end of every combat turn.
column2: 使艦艇能夠進出時空連續體,讓其在每個戰鬥回合結束時可額外行動一回合。

column1: The titan class of starship is gigantic in proportion to other ships, and requires advanced engineering techniques to both construct and integrate ship systems.
column2: 泰坦級星艦相較於其他艦艇體型極為龐大,無論建造或整合艦上系統都需要先進的工程技術。

column1: The standard armor of ships.
column2: 艦艇的標準裝甲。

column1: It requires 1 tractor beam per size class of target ship to completely stop  the target. Ships not held completely lose a portion of movement. Motionless  ships can be boarded and are easy targets to hit.
column2: 需要與目標艦艇體型等級相同數量的牽引光束,才能將目標完全定住。未被完全定住的艦艇會損失部分移動力。無法移動的艦艇容易被登艦,也更容易被擊中。

column1: Troop carrier for landing 4 marine units on a planet. They do not engage in combat and will be destroyed when attacked if not escorted by military ships. Once used, they are dismantled. Can only be built on planets with marine barracks.
column2: 用於將 4 個陸戰隊單位投送至行星的部隊運輸艦。運輸艦不參與戰鬥,若無軍艦護航,遭受攻擊時會被摧毀。使用後即會解體。僅能在擁有陸戰隊兵營的行星上建造。

column1: Allow a ship to move marines to an enemy ship at a range of 12 squares, as long as the shield facing the ship is down. Can also be used to drop bombs on planets up to 12 squares away.
column2: 使艦艇能在 12 格射程內,將陸戰隊送上敵艦,前提是敵艦朝向本艦的護盾已失效。亦可用於對最遠 12 格外的行星投放炸彈。

column1: Ships with this armor have twice the base structure and armor points. The hit points of fighters are multiplied by 1.5. Adds +10 to ground troop combat strengths.
column2: 裝備此裝甲的艦艇,基礎結構與裝甲點數皆為兩倍。戰機的生命值乘以 1.5。使地面部隊戰鬥力 +10。

column1: Troop pods house additional detachments of space marines, doubling the number of marines on board a ship. The additional marines can defend the ship or board enemy ships.
column2: 部隊艙可容納額外的太空陸戰隊分隊,使艦上陸戰隊人數加倍。額外的陸戰隊可用於防禦本艦,或登上敵艦作戰。

column1: Increases the population growth rate of all colonies by +50% and quarters the chance for death spores and bio-terminators to kill a population.  Not cumulative with microbiotics.
column2: 使所有殖民地的人口成長率提高 +50%,並將死亡孢子與生化終結者殺死人口的機率降為四分之一。此效果不與微生物技術疊加。

column1: Supply sufficient energy to propel a ship 12 parsecs before refueling.
column2: 提供足夠能量,使艦艇在需要補給前可航行 12 秒差距。

column1: Creates a galaxy wide cyberspace connection which individuals can tap into to experience alternate realities. Increases morale +20% throughout your entire empire.
column2: 建立橫跨全銀河的電子網路連線,使個人得以連接並體驗另類現實。使整個帝國的士氣提高 +20%。

column1: Creates a large radius field about a ship that prevents any ship from entering into hyperspace. Enemy ships cannot retreat while the dissipator is functioning.
column2: 在艦艇周圍產生大範圍力場,阻止任何艦艇進入超空間。曲速消散器運作期間,敵艦無法撤退。

column1: Creates a warp destabilizing field around the star system in which it is built. Generates a field 2 parsecs in radius about the system that slows all enemy movement to 1 parsec per turn.
column2: 在建造所在的星系周圍產生曲速失穩力場,形成半徑 2 秒差距的力場範圍,使範圍內所有敵艦的移動速度降至每回合 1 秒差距。

column1: Modifies a planet's weather patterns to create a more stable farming environment. Food production is increased by +2 per farmer.
column2: 調節行星的天氣型態,打造更穩定的農業環境。使每位農民的食物產量增加 +2。

column1: Adds +130 to a ship's missile evasion rating, adds +70 to the missile evasion of other ships in the fleet. The fleet's bonus is not  cumulative with any missile evasion bonus given by other jammers. Only the best  bonus will apply.
column2: 使該艦飛彈迴避評等 +130,並使艦隊中其他艦艇的飛彈迴避 +70。此艦隊加成不與其他干擾器提供的飛彈迴避加成疊加,只採用最高的加成。

column1: Focuses on the motivations of other races in an attempt to form deals that are more appealing. The effect is to permanently add +30 diplomatic points to every deal offered to your opponents.
column2: 深入研究其他種族的行為動機,以擬定更具吸引力的交易條件。效果為永久對提交給對手的每項交易增加 +30 外交點數。

column1: Ships with this armor have 10 times the base structure and armor points. The hit points of fighters are multiplied by 5. Adds +30 to ground troop combat strengths.
column2: 裝備此裝甲的艦艇,基礎結構與裝甲點數皆為十倍。戰機的生命值乘以 5。使地面部隊戰鬥力 +30。

column1: Carries a powerful explosive warhead capable of delivering 30 points of damage. Modifications: MIRV, emissions guidance, fast traveling, armored and ECCM.
column2: 搭載強力爆炸彈頭,可造成 30 點傷害。可用改造:多彈頭、輻射導引、快速、重裝甲與反反制。

column1: Ships with this armor have 4 times the base structure and armor points. The hit points of fighters are multiplied by 2. Adds +15 to ground troop combat strengths.
column2: 裝備此裝甲的艦艇,基礎結構與裝甲點數皆為四倍。戰機的生命值乘以 2。使地面部隊戰鬥力 +15。

column1: Hyper advances in Biology serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all genetics applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 生物學領域的超進展,可提升所有遺傳學應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Power serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all power applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 動力領域的超進展,可提升所有動力應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Physics serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all physics applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 物理學領域的超進展,可提升所有物理學應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Construction serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all construction applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 建設領域的超進展,可提升所有建設應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Fields serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all fields applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 力場領域的超進展,可提升所有力場應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Chemistry serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all chemistry applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 化學領域的超進展,可提升所有化學應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Computers serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all computer applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 電腦領域的超進展,可提升所有電腦應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: Hyper advances in Sociology serve to increase the miniaturization levels of all sociology applications and are worth +5 points to your score.
column2: 社會學領域的超進展,可提升所有社會學應用的微型化程度,並為你的分數增加 +5 分。

column1: If you want to create a new colony within the same system as a colony you  already own, choose to build a COLONY BASE from the Colony Production screen.  Once built, you will be asked to select the planet you wish to place it on.  One unit of the building colony's population is also transfered to the new  colony. To create a colony in a new star system, choose to build a COLONY  SHIP. When done, the building colony transfers one population unit to the  ship, which can then be sent to a new system. Once it arrives, you will be  prompted to select a planet to land on. Colony ships can be moved like any  other ship, or can be sent using the SEND COLONY SHIP button on the  Planets screen.
column2: 若想在你已擁有殖民地的同一星系內建立新殖民地,可在殖民地生產畫面選擇建造「殖民基地」。建造完成後,系統會要求你選擇要將其設置在哪顆行星上。建造殖民地也會轉移一單位人口至新殖民地。若要在新的星系建立殖民地,則選擇建造「殖民船」。完成後,建造殖民地會將一單位人口轉移至該殖民船,之後即可將其派往新的星系。抵達後,系統會提示你選擇要降落的行星。殖民船可以像其他艦艇一樣移動,也可以透過行星畫面上的「派遣殖民船」按鈕派遣。

column1: To move a ship from one system to another, click on its icon on the main  Galaxy Map.  This will display all ships currently in orbit around that  system. All ships highlighted in blue are currently selected. Clicking on  individual pictures selects/deselects them, clicking on ALL  selects/deselects all ships in that fleet. Once you have highlighted the  ships you wish to move, move the cursor over the star system to wish to send  them to. A green line indicates that it is within range, and the popup lists  the ETA in turns. If the line is red, the system is out of range. The popup  indicates how many parsecs away it is from your nearest colony.
column2: 若要將艦艇從一個星系移動到另一個星系,請在主銀河地圖上點擊該星系的圖示。這會顯示目前停泊在該星系軌道上的所有艦艇。以藍色標示的艦艇即為目前已選取的艦艇。點擊個別圖示可選取/取消選取該艦艇,點擊「全部」則可選取/取消選取該艦隊中的所有艦艇。選好要移動的艦艇後,將游標移至你想派遣它們前往的星系上方。綠色連線表示該星系在航程範圍內,彈出視窗會顯示以回合計算的預計抵達時間。若連線為紅色,表示該星系超出航程範圍。彈出視窗會顯示該星系與你最近殖民地相距多少秒差距。

column1: There are two ways to transfer colonists. You can select the colony you wish to transfer from, then click on the population unit you wish to move. A TRANSFER COLONISTS button will appear. Clicking on this button brings up a list of your colonies, with icons representing their current population. Place the colonist you selected in the box corresponding to the colony you are sending it to. You can also transfer colonists by clicking on the COLONIES button on the main Galaxy Map screen. Select the unit of population you wish to move, and put in the appropriate occupation box of the colony you wish to move it to. In both cases, you will receive a warning if the colony you selected is already at maximum population.
column2: 移民有兩種方式。你可以先選擇要移出人口的殖民地,再點擊想移動的人口單位,此時會出現「移民」按鈕。點擊此按鈕會顯示你所有殖民地的清單,並以圖示表示各殖民地目前的人口。將你選取的移民放入你要派往的殖民地對應方格中即可。你也可以透過主銀河地圖畫面上的「殖民地」按鈕來移民。選擇想移動的人口單位,並放入你想移入的殖民地對應職業方格中。無論採用哪種方式,若你選擇的殖民地人口已達上限,系統都會發出警告。

column1: To assign a leader to a planet or ship, click on the LEADERS button on either the main Galaxy Map screen or on the Colony screen. You can toggle between colony leaders and ship officers by  clicking on the buttons in the top left corner. Select the ship or star system you wish to assign a leader to, then select which leader you are sending.
column2: 若要指派領袖到行星或艦艇,請點擊主銀河地圖畫面或殖民地畫面上的「領袖」按鈕。你可以點擊左上角的按鈕,在殖民地領袖與艦艇軍官之間切換。選擇你要指派領袖的艦艇或星系,再選擇要派遣的領袖。

column1: First you must build a Dimensional Portal. If you are not a trans-dimensional race, you can research this application under Multi-Dimensional Physics. Once a colony has built the portal, click on the ships orbiting that colony that you wish to send. An ATTACK ANTARES button will appear; selecting it sends the fleet to Antares.
column2: 首先你必須建造次元傳送門。若你的種族並非跨次元種族,可在多維物理科技下研究此應用。殖民地建成傳送門後,點擊停泊在該殖民地軌道上、你想派遣的艦艇,此時會出現「攻擊安塔瑞斯」按鈕,選取後即可將艦隊派往安塔瑞斯。

column1: You must have a TRANSPORT SHIP in your fleet to capture a planet. Send the fleet to the system and select the planet you wish to capture. If you lose the combat, your transport ships will retreat. If you win, you will be promted to either BOMBARD or INVADE. You can choose to bombard slowly, then stop and invade after the colony's defenses have been destroyed. If your invasion is sucessful, you can elect to annihilate the occupants, or force them to serve you. Specific race characteristics and technologies will affect your ability to do either.
column2: 艦隊中必須有「運輸艦」才能佔領行星。將艦隊派往該星系,並選擇你要佔領的行星。若戰鬥落敗,你的運輸艦將會撤退。若獲勝,系統會提示你選擇「轟炸」或「入侵」。你可以選擇緩慢轟炸,待殖民地防禦被摧毀後再停止並改為入侵。若入侵成功,你可以選擇殲滅當地居民,或是強迫其為你效力。特定種族特性與科技將影響你執行這兩種選擇的能力。

column1: You must have a ship equipped with TRANSPORTERS to capture a ship. Transporters allow a ship to move marines to an enemy ship at a range of 12 squares, as long as the enemy's shield facing the ship is down. Once the transportes reach the enemy, a quick combat occurs. If you are sucessful, the enemy ship is taken over, and becomes yours at the end of the space combat.
column2: 艦艇必須裝備「傳送器」才能俘獲敵艦。傳送器可使艦艇在 12 格射程內,將陸戰隊送上敵艦,前提是敵艦朝向本艦的護盾已失效。陸戰隊登上敵艦後,會發生一場快速戰鬥。若你獲勝,該敵艦將被佔領,並在太空戰鬥結束後歸你所有。

column1: Left click on the TREASURY WINDOW on the main Galaxy Map screen. This brings up a popup from which you can set your new rate. The percentage value of the tax rate is the percentage of all production from your colonies to be turned into cash.
column2: 在主銀河地圖畫面上左鍵點擊「國庫視窗」,會彈出視窗讓你設定新的稅率。稅率的百分比數值,即代表你所有殖民地生產力中要轉換為現金的比例。

column1: If threat of a supernova occurs in one of your star systems, you need to maximize research within that system. The total number of research points generated by all colonies in the system are applied to research on a solar regenerator. If your total accumulated research points exceeds the strength of the supernova before time is up, the disaster is prevented.
column2: 若你的某個星系出現超新星威脅,你需要將該星系的研究產出最大化。該星系內所有殖民地產生的研究點數總和,將投入恆星再生器的研發。若你累積的研究點數總和在時限前超過超新星的強度,即可阻止此災難發生。

column1: Once a plague occurs on one of your colonies, you need to maximize the amount of research being done in that colony. All research points generated in that colony are applied to discovering a cure. Once your total accumulated research points exceeds the strength of the plague, the disaster ends.
column2: 一旦你的某個殖民地爆發瘟疫,你需要將該殖民地的研究產出最大化。該殖民地產生的所有研究點數,都會投入尋找解藥。當你累積的研究點數總和超過瘟疫的強度時,此災難即會結束。

column1: To end pirate activity in a star system, you need to increase the fleet orbiting that system. Once the fleet strength (determined by number of ships and ship size) is greater than the strength of the pirate's fleet, the pirates cease to destroy freighters.
column2: 若要終結某星系內的海盜活動,你需要增強停泊在該星系的艦隊。當你的艦隊戰力(由艦艇數量與體型決定)超過海盜艦隊的戰力時,海盜就會停止摧毀貨船。

column1: If one of your colonies is threatened by a comet, you need to increase the number of ships in orbit around that system.  If the total fleet strength (determined by the number and size of the ships) is greater than the  strength of the comet before time is up, the comet is destroyed.
column2: 若你的某個殖民地受到彗星威脅,你需要增加停泊在該星系軌道上的艦艇數量。若你的艦隊總戰力(由艦艇數量與體型決定)在時限前超過彗星的強度,該彗星即會被摧毀。

column1: This option is not available in Strategic Combat games. To update the systems or weapons of existing ships in your fleet, select a colony in the system the ship is orbiting. Click the REFIT button on the Colony Production screen.  Select which ship you wish to refit. The ship will be upgraded with any new armor or shields that you have developed. Changes to systems and weapons can then be made on the Ship Design screen (see How to Design Ships).
column2: 此選項在戰略戰鬥模式的對局中無法使用。若要更新艦隊中現有艦艇的系統或武器,請在該艦艇所停泊星系中選擇一個殖民地,並點擊殖民地生產畫面上的「改裝」按鈕,選擇要改裝的艦艇。系統會以你已研發的新裝甲或護盾升級該艦艇。系統與武器的變更則須在艦艇設計畫面進行(參見〈如何設計艦艇〉)。

column1: Not available in Strategic Combat games. Click on the DESIGN button on the Colony Production screen and select which size you want to design. The ship will automatically be equipped  with your best drive, armor, computer, and shields. To change a weapon, click on the its name. This calls up a list of all available weapons. Click on the new weapon, choosing any modifications you may want. Click ACCEPT to include that weapon in the design. To delete  a weapon from the design, select NO WEAPON. To add a weapon, run the cursor to the bottom of the current ship weapons list. If there is enough room onboard, you will see an ADD NEW WEAPON option. Add systems in the same way.
column2: 此選項在戰略戰鬥模式的對局中無法使用。點擊殖民地生產畫面上的「設計」按鈕,選擇你想設計的艦體大小。艦艇會自動配備你目前最好的引擎、裝甲、電腦與護盾。若要更換武器,點擊武器名稱,即可叫出所有可用武器的清單。點擊你要的新武器,並選擇所需的任何改造項目,再點擊「確定」將該武器納入設計。若要從設計中刪除武器,選擇「無武器」即可。若要新增武器,將游標移至目前艦艇武器清單的底部,若艦上還有足夠空間,就會出現「新增武器」選項。新增系統的方式相同。

column1: Right click on most items, buttons, screens throughtout the game to obtain a detailed definition or explanation.
column2: 在遊戲中大多數的項目、按鈕與畫面上按右鍵,即可取得詳細的定義或說明。

column1: Each planet has a specific size, climate, gravity, and mineral classification. Choose a planet that best suits your needs: Gaia, Terran, Ocean, Desert, and Tundra climates will allow you to farm. Abundant, Rich, and Ultra Rich mineral classifications will increase your production. Heavy or low gravities will have negative effects on your production if you have no special racial immunities. Remember that building freighters will allow you to transport food to planets with no farming, and enable you to establish colonies  that focus on research or production.
column2: 每顆行星都有其特定的大小、氣候、重力與礦產分類。請依需求選擇最合適的行星:蓋亞、陸棲、海洋、沙漠與凍原氣候可供農耕;豐富、富饒與極豐富的礦產分類則可提高生產力;若你的種族沒有特殊的免疫能力,重力過重或過輕都會對生產力造成負面影響。別忘了,建造貨船可以將食物運送到不適合農耕的行星,讓你建立以研究或生產為主的殖民地。

column1: You shouldn't ever see this
column2: 你應該永遠不會看到這段文字

column1: Increases the damage of a weapon by +50% and doubles the range of the weapon  at the cost of double the space.
column2: 使武器傷害提高 +50%,並使射程加倍,但代價是所需空間也加倍。

column1: Increases the maximum damage of the weapon by +50%.
column2: 使武器的最大傷害提高 +50%。

column1: Weapons take up half the normal space but range damage penalties are doubled for purposes of energy weapon strength loss. Point defense weapons have a +25% chance to hit bonus.
column2: 武器僅佔一半的正常空間,但在計算能量武器隨射程衰減的傷害損失時,衰減幅度加倍。點防禦武器擁有 +25% 的命中機率加成。

column1: Allows the weapon to be fired three separate times with a -20 chance to hit each time. Auto Fire increases the cost and space of a weapon by +50%.
column2: 使武器可分三次獨立發射,每次命中機率降低 -20。自動射擊會使武器的成本與所需空間增加 +50%。

column1: Halves the value of enemy armor and adds a +3 chance to breach the armor and inflict internal damage
column2: 使敵方裝甲數值減半,並增加 +3 的機率貫穿裝甲、造成內部傷害。

column1: Shield piercing weapons are completely unaffected by any shields except those with the Hard Shields special device.
column2: 穿盾武器完全不受任何護盾影響,唯有裝備硬化護盾特殊裝置的目標除外。

column1: Increases the chance of the weapon to hit by +30.
column2: 使武器的命中機率提高 +30。

column1: The strength of the weapon will not be reduced by range.
column2: 武器的威力不會因射程而衰減。

column1: Inflicts normal damage to all four shields of the target, simultaneously.
column2: 同時對目標所有四面護盾造成正常傷害。

column1: Missiles take 10 hits instead of 4 to be destroyed.
column2: 飛彈須承受 10 次命中(而非 4 次)才會被摧毀。

column1: Missiles move +4 squares faster per turn than normal.
column2: 使飛彈每回合的移動速度比正常快 +4 格。

column1: Allows a missile to dodge enemy attack. Adds +30% to a missile's defense.
column2: 使飛彈能夠閃避敵方攻擊,使飛彈的防禦力 +30%。

column1: The Info Screen allows you to look up information, view current and historical data, check messages, review your technology, change your current research, adjust tax rates, and turn the Resource and Galaxy windows on and off.
column2: 資訊畫面讓你可以查閱資料、檢視目前與歷史數據、查看訊息、檢閱你的科技、變更目前的研究項目、調整稅率,以及開關資源視窗與銀河視窗。

column1: Select the subscreen you wish to view with these buttons.
column2: 使用這些按鈕選擇你想檢視的子畫面。

column1: This window shows your current income and your maintanence costs as a percentage of income in each of six categories.
column2: 此視窗顯示你目前的收入,以及六個類別中各項維護費用佔收入的百分比。

column1: This subscreen allows you to select a category or "how to" topic for more information.
column2: 此子畫面讓你選擇類別或「操作說明」主題,以取得更多資訊。

column1: Provides information on the topics within the selected category.
column2: 提供你所選類別中各項主題的相關資訊。

column1: Provides information on the selected "how to" topic.
column2: 提供你所選「操作說明」主題的相關資訊。

column1: This screen displays a current, scrollable, list of messages requiring your attention. If you click on a colony-related message, you will be transported to the appropriate colony to deal with the situation there, then brought back to this subscreen when finished.
column2: 此畫面顯示目前需要你關注的訊息清單,可捲動檢視。若點擊與殖民地相關的訊息,你會被帶往對應的殖民地處理該狀況,完成後再返回此子畫面。

column1: Information about yourself and each of the races you are currently in contact with is displayed on this subscreen. If there are more than four races to be displayed, clicking on the "More" button will show you the others.
column2: 此子畫面顯示你自身以及目前已接觸的各種族相關資訊。若需顯示的種族超過四個,點擊「更多」按鈕即可查看其餘種族。

column1: All the technology you have researched or otherwise received is displayed in the scrollable list window. Pointing to an item will display a picture and description of that item.
column2: 你已研發或以其他方式取得的所有科技,都會顯示在可捲動的清單視窗中。將游標指向某項目,即會顯示該項目的圖片與說明。

column1: This screen provides you with a graphical representation of how you and the other races you are in contact with are doing. You can change the information that is integrated into the graphs by clicking on any of the factor buttons below the graph.
column2: 此畫面以圖表方式呈現你與目前已接觸的其他種族的發展狀況。點擊圖表下方任一項目按鈕,即可變更圖表中呈現的資訊。

column1: \nRight-click on any application to display a brief description of that appliction.
column2: \n在任何應用科技上按右鍵,即可顯示該應用科技的簡短說明。

column1: \nLeft-click on the either the field name or any application to select that technology for research.
column2: \n左鍵點擊領域名稱或任何應用科技,即可選擇該科技作為研究項目。

column1: \nClick on a category button to display a list of other fields under that category.
column2: \n點擊類別按鈕,即可顯示該類別下其他領域的清單。

column1: All the technologies available to you for your next research project are shown under their appropriate categories (Construction, Biology, etc.) along with their research cost.
column2: 你下一項研究項目可選的所有科技,都會依所屬類別(建設、生物學等)列出,並附上其研究成本。

column1: All the technologies available to you for research projects are shown under their appropriate categories (Construction, Biology, etc.) along with their research costs adjusted for any prior research. The field you are currently researching is displayed in a different color. \nLeft-click on "CANCEL" if you do not wish to change research projects.
column2: 所有可供你研究的科技,都會依所屬類別(建設、生物學等)列出,並附上已依先前研究進度調整後的研究成本。你目前正在研究的領域會以不同顏色顯示。\n若不想變更研究項目,請左鍵點擊「取消」。

column1: This display shows the fields yet to be researched within a given category. If the current or previous project is within the selected category, it will be shown in a different color. \nLeft-click the "CANCEL" button or anywhere outside of the list window to close it and return to the selection window.
column2: 此畫面顯示所選類別中尚未研究的領域。若目前或先前的研究項目屬於所選類別,將以不同顏色顯示。\n左鍵點擊「取消」按鈕,或點擊清單視窗以外的任何位置,即可關閉此畫面並返回選擇畫面。

column1: This is your primary diplomacy screen. Here you can check on your relationships, treaties and spies. You can also assign spies to other races, move them from race to race or bring them home. Pick up a spy by left-clicking on a spy icon. Then click again to drop the spy where you wish.
column2: 這是你主要的外交畫面。你可以在此查看與其他種族的關係、條約與間諜狀態,也可以將間諜指派給其他種族、在不同種族間調動,或將其召回。左鍵點擊間諜圖示即可拿起該間諜,再次點擊即可將其放置到你想要的位置。

column1:
The multi-color bar in the middle of an individual race display shows you your current relative relationship with the race. To the right of that, you can see your current treaty status. 

The spies you  currently have assigned to this race are shown as icons and their  current mission is indicated by one of the highlighted buttons at the  bottom of the display. Espionage has the spies attempting to steal  technology.  Sabotage has the spies attempting to destroy buildings.  Hide just has the spies awaiting orders.  You can change the spies' mission  by clicking on a different button. 

Finally, at the bottom right corner of  the screen you see your current supply of unassigned agents along with your  current agent bonus.
column2:
個別種族顯示區塊中央的多色長條,顯示你目前與該種族的相對關係。長條右側則可看到你目前的條約狀態。

你目前指派給該種族的間諜會以圖示顯示,其目前的任務則由畫面下方其中一個被標示的按鈕表示。「刺探情報」表示間諜正試圖竊取科技;「破壞」表示間諜正試圖破壞建築;「潛伏」則表示間諜僅在等待指令。點擊不同按鈕即可變更間諜的任務。

最後,畫面右下角會顯示你目前未指派探員的數量,以及你目前的探員加成。

column1: Your current supply of unassigned agents is shown here along with your current agent bonus.
column2: 此處顯示您目前未分配特工的數量,以及目前的特工加成。

column1: Clicking on this button will allow you to pick a race whose diplomatic overtures you wish to ignore. When the mouse pointer turns to "who?" click on the picture of the race you want to ignore.
column2: 點擊此按鈕可選擇一個您想忽略其外交提議的種族。當滑鼠指標變成「who?」時,點擊您想忽略的種族圖片。

column1: Clicking on this button will allow you to select a race for which you wish to see a current report. When the mouse pointer turns to "who?" click on the picture of the race on which you want a report made.
column2: 點擊此按鈕可選擇您想查看目前報告的種族。當滑鼠指標變成「who?」時,點擊您想製作報告的種族圖片。

column1: Clicking on this button will allow you to select a race you wish to make diplomatic contact with. When the mouse pointer turns to "who?" click on the picture of the race you want to contact.
column2: 點擊此按鈕可選擇您想進行外交接觸的種族。當滑鼠指標變成「who?」時,點擊您想接觸的種族圖片。

column1: This screen shows you the latest information available on the selected race. It includes a picture of the race's leader, a description of their personality, any known spies they have in your empire, a list of their alliances and wars, and a list of their technological achievements. The age of the report should be considered when relying on the report's informational accuracy.
column2: 此畫面顯示所選種族目前可取得的最新資訊,包括該種族領袖的圖片、性格描述、已知潛伏在您帝國中的間諜、其結盟與戰爭清單,以及科技成就清單。使用此報告資訊時,應考量報告的時效性對準確度的影響。

column1: Select a category of diplomatic action from the menu of choices. Selections that are presently unavailable are shown in reduced intensity.\n
column2: 從選單中選擇一種外交行動類別。目前無法選擇的項目會以較暗淡的方式顯示。\n

column1: This selection allows you to discuss make or break a treaty, declare war, or encourage the other race to act against a third party.\n
column2: 此選項讓您可以商討締結或撕毀條約、宣戰,或慫恿對方種族對第三方採取行動。\n

column1: This lets you forge or break a trade agreement.\n
column2: 這讓您可以締結或撕毀貿易協定。\n

column1: Picking this will let you discuss a research swap.\n
column2: 選擇此項可讓您商討研究交換。\n

column1: Tribute is the selection you want if appeasement is your goal.\n
column2: 若您的目標是安撫對方,「進貢」就是您要選的項目。\n

column1: Threatening people is the last resort for some, the first choice for others, but rarely makes friends.
column2: 威脅他人對某些人來說是最後手段,對另一些人卻是首選,但這麼做很少能交到朋友。

column1: This menu gives you options related to treaties and declarations of war. Selections that are presently unavailable are shown in reduced intensity.\n
column2: 此選單提供與條約及宣戰相關的選項。目前無法選擇的項目會以較暗淡的方式顯示。\n

column1:
^ Alliance
   ^ Non-Agression Pact
   ^ Peace Treaty
column2:
^ 同盟
   ^ 互不侵犯條約
   ^ 和平條約

column1: ^ (current treaty)\n   ^ Break a Treaty with...\n
column2: ^ (目前條約)\n   ^ 撕毀與…的條約\n

column1:
^ Declare War
   ^ Declare War with...
column2:
^ 宣戰
   ^ 對…宣戰

column1: Select "CANCEL" to return to the previous menu.
column2: 選擇「取消」以返回上一個選單。

column1: Select the race you wish this race to break their treaty with.\n\n
column2: 選擇您希望此種族撕毀其條約的對象種族。\n\n

column1: Select the race you wish this race to declare war upon.\n\n
column2: 選擇您希望此種族對其宣戰的對象種族。\n\n

column1: From this menu you may choose to make either a cash or technology trade agreement. You may also elect to break a current trade agreement if one exists.\n\n
column2: 從此選單中,您可以選擇締結現金或科技貿易協定,也可以選擇撕毀現有的貿易協定(若有的話)。\n\n

column1: Select the cash value for your trade agreement.\n\n
column2: 選擇您貿易協定的現金金額。\n\n

column1: Select the technology level you wish to include in the trade agreement.\n\n
column2: 選擇您想納入貿易協定的科技等級。\n\n

column1: From the scrollable list of offered technology, select an item to swap for an item of yours. The other race will then decide if they like what you offer and pick something of yours they want in exchange.\n\n
column2: 從可捲動的提供科技清單中,選擇一項用來交換您的科技。對方種族接著會判斷是否喜歡您提供的項目,並挑選他們想從您這裡換取的東西。\n\n

column1: Select the type of tribute you want to give to this race.\n\n
column2: 選擇您想給予此種族的進貢類型。\n\n

column1: Select the cash value of your "gift."\n\n
column2: 選擇您「禮物」的現金金額。\n\n

column1: From the scrollable list, select the item of technology you wish to provide to this race as a token of your esteem.\n\n
column2: 從可捲動的清單中,選擇您想提供給此種族作為敬意象徵的科技項目。\n\n

column1: The star date tells you how long you've been playing the game. Each time  you press next turn, the star date increases by .1
column2: 星曆日期顯示您已進行遊戲的時間長度。每按一次「下一回合」,星曆日期就會增加 0.1。

column1: From this popup, you can change game settings, load a previously-saved game or save the current game. In addition, you can turn game music on or off. Also, sound effects can be toggled on or off.
column2: 在此彈出視窗中,您可以變更遊戲設定、讀取先前存檔或儲存目前遊戲進度。此外,您可以開關遊戲音樂,音效也可以開關切換。

column1: From this window you see the current number of credits (BC for billion credits) at your disposal. You may left-click in this window to change your tax rate\n
column2: 在此視窗中,您可以看到目前可支配的資金數量(BC 代表十億點數)。您可以在此視窗中按滑鼠左鍵以變更稅率\n

column1: This window displays your current income or, more precisely, the  number of credits (BC) you receive each turn. If this number is negative,  it will appear in red.
column2: 此視窗顯示您目前的收入,更精確地說,是您每回合收到的點數(BC)數量。若此數字為負數,將以紅色顯示。

column1:
Command points affect the maintenance you pay for ships in your fleet.  Each ship you build removes points from your reserve, while each station  you build adds points to the reserve. Warlords gain 2 per colony, while  Imperium goverments increases your reserve by 50% You may left-click in this window to get a summary of your command points.

 The first number in this window shows your current command point reserve.  If this number is positive, you can safely build more ships. 

 If the number is negative, each point is costing you 10 BC per turn.  The second number, displayed in parentheses, shows your total command points. 

 The following chart breaks down how command points are calculated.
column2:
指揮點數影響您為艦隊船艦所支付的維護費用。您建造的每艘船艦都會從儲備中扣除點數,而您建造的每座太空站則會為儲備增加點數。軍閥政體每個殖民地可獲得 2 點,而帝制政體則會使您的儲備增加 50%。您可以在此視窗中按滑鼠左鍵取得指揮點數摘要。

 此視窗中的第一個數字顯示您目前的指揮點數儲備。若此數字為正數,您可以安全地建造更多船艦。

 若此數字為負數,每點每回合將花費您 10 BC。第二個數字顯示於括號中,代表您的指揮點數總量。

 下表詳列指揮點數的計算方式。

column1:
\x07X3.Frigate\x07X97.-1 \x07X150.Star Base\x07X270.+1
 \x07X3.Destroyer\x07X97.-2 \x07X150.Battlestation\x07X270.+2
 \x07X3.Cruiser\x07X97.-3 \x07X150.Star Fortress\x07X270.+3
 \x07X3.Battleship\x07X97.-4 \x07X150.Tachyon Comm\x07X270.+1/base
 \x07X3.Titan Ship\x07X97.-5 \x07X150.Subspace Comm\x07X270.+2/base
 \x07X3.Doom Star\x07X97.-6 \x07X150.Hyperspace Comm\x07X270.+3/base
This window displays how much NET food is being produced each turn,  throughout your empire.
column2: 此視窗顯示您整個帝國每回合生產的淨糧食量。

column1: This window displays two pieces of data relating to freighters. The first value is the amount of available freighters, or those NOT in use. The total number of freighters appears second and in parentheses.  You may "sell back" freighters by "left-clicking" in this window.
column2: 此視窗顯示與貨運船相關的兩項數據。第一個數值是可用貨運船的數量,即目前「未使用」的貨運船。第二個數值顯示於括號中,代表貨運船總數。您可以在此視窗中按滑鼠左鍵「賣回」貨運船。

column1: This windows shows the status of your current research efforts. During most of the research, your progress is shown in turns. This is an approximate value. When your accumulated research points reach the stated  cost of the item you are researching, you will be given a percent chance  to achieve the breakthrough each turn thereafter.\n\n The second line in this window shows  the current number of research points (RPs) your empire generates each turn. You may left-click in this window to change your current field of research.
column2: 此視窗顯示您目前研究進度的狀態。在大多數研究過程中,進度會以回合數顯示,這是一個概略數值。當您累積的研究點數達到正在研究項目所需的成本時,此後每回合您將有一定百分比的機率取得突破。\n\n 此視窗的第二行顯示您帝國每回合產生的目前研究點數(RP)。您可以在此視窗中按滑鼠左鍵變更目前的研究領域。

column1: Pressing the "Colonies" button takes you to the Colony Overview screen.  You will see all of your colonies, what they are currently producing and  the amount of population assigned to farming, production and research.  You can alter these values here or jump directly to the Colony screen.\n
column2: 按下「殖民地」按鈕會帶您進入殖民地總覽畫面。您會看到所有殖民地目前的生產內容,以及分配到農業、生產與研究的人口數量。您可以在此變更這些數值,或直接跳至殖民地畫面。\n

column1:
Pressing the "Planets" button takes you to the Planet Overview screen. Here you will see all of the planets you have discovered. Using filters,  you can reduce the list to show planets that are not enemy-controlled,  planets that produce food, planets where production is not hindered, etc.

 Once filtered, you can deploy ships to colonize a planet.
column2:
按下「行星」按鈕會帶您進入行星總覽畫面。在此您會看到所有已發現的行星。使用篩選器,您可以縮減清單範圍,只顯示非敵方控制的行星、能生產糧食的行星、生產未受阻礙的行星等等。

 篩選完成後,您可以派遣船艦前往殖民行星。

column1: Pressing the "Fleet" button takes you to the Fleet Overview screen where you can manage all the ships in your empire. Scrapping ships, relocating ships to another system, and assigning or removing officers can be done  here. You may also give movement orders to any ship from this screen.
column2: 按下「艦隊」按鈕會帶您進入艦隊總覽畫面,在此您可以管理帝國中的所有船艦。您可以在此報廢船艦、將船艦調往其他星系,以及指派或撤除軍官。您也可以在此畫面對任何船艦下達移動指令。

column1: Press the "Turn" button when you are done entering orders for the current  turn. If you are in a "hot-seat" game, play continues with the next player.  If you are in a "network" game, play continues when all players have  entered their orders. Otherwise, non-player opponents will plot their moves  and the computer will display the results in the "reports" phase of the  next turn.
column2: 當您完成本回合的指令輸入後,按下「回合」按鈕。若您正在進行「輪流」遊戲,遊戲會接著換下一位玩家。若您正在進行「網路」遊戲,則會在所有玩家都輸入指令後繼續進行。否則,非玩家對手將會規劃他們的行動,電腦會在下一回合的「報告」階段顯示結果。

column1: Pressing the "Leaders" button takes you to the Leader Screen. Here you can assign or dismiss current leaders, hire leaders currently in the "for hire" queue, or deactivate assigned leaders to a "waiting" pool.  This screen shows information on all available leaders, so you can see how  much maintenance a leader costs or will cost, and any skills that he or she  brings to your empire. Detailed help on leader skills is available here.\n
column2: 按下「領袖」按鈕會帶您進入領袖畫面。在此您可以指派或解僱現有領袖、僱用目前在「待僱」佇列中的領袖,或將已指派的領袖轉為待命狀態放入人才庫。此畫面顯示所有可用領袖的資訊,讓您了解某位領袖目前或未來的維護費用,以及他或她能為帝國帶來的技能。此處也提供領袖技能的詳細說明。\n

column1: Pressing the "Races" button takes you to the Race Screen. Here you  will get an overview of your contacts with other races in the game. You  can set and/or nullify peace treaties and assign spies to any one of several nefarious missions.\n
column2: 按下「種族」按鈕會帶您進入種族畫面。在此您可以總覽與遊戲中其他種族的接觸狀況。您可以締結及/或廢除和平條約,並將間諜指派執行各種不法任務。\n

column1: Press the "Info" button to take you to the Info Screen. Here you will get detailed help on every aspect of the game, from technology advances to  effects of different governments. Bars and charts show your empire's  development relative to all of your opponents.
column2: 按下「資訊」按鈕會帶您進入資訊畫面。在此您可以取得遊戲各方面的詳細說明,從科技進展到不同政體的效果皆有涵蓋。長條圖與圖表會顯示您的帝國相對於所有對手的發展狀況。

column1: Pressing the "+" button zooms IN from your current map, allowing you a closer look at the galaxy. A "zoom box" will appear. Move the box with  your mouse to the area you want to see in more detail. When you press the left mouse, the map will zoom in. Alternatively, you may continue pressing the "-" button. The zoom box will get smaller as you are, in effect,  zooming in further.\n
column2: 按下「+」按鈕會從目前的地圖放大,讓您更仔細地觀察銀河。此時會出現一個「縮放框」。用滑鼠將此框移到您想更詳細觀看的區域,按下滑鼠左鍵後地圖便會放大。您也可以持續按「-」按鈕,縮放框會隨之縮小,實際上等於進一步放大檢視。\n

column1: Pressing the "-" button zooms OUT from your current map, condensing the number of stars and allowing you to see MORE of the galaxy.
column2: 按下「-」按鈕會從目前的地圖縮小,壓縮恆星的顯示密度,讓您能看到更多銀河範圍。

column1: This is where you will be notified if a player seeks to negotiate  with you. If you see one of the circles lit, go to the RACES screen to initiate diplomatic interactions. Only available in multiplayer games
column2: 這裡是當有玩家想與您協商時通知您的地方。若您看到其中一個圓圈亮起,請前往「種族」畫面展開外交互動。此功能僅在多人遊戲中可用。

column1: This is where you will be notified when a player has completed his turn. As each player completes his turn in a multi-player game, a circle will be filled with his player-color
column2: 這裡是當有玩家完成其回合時通知您的地方。在多人遊戲中,每當有玩家完成回合,對應的圓圈就會填上該玩家的顏色。

column1: Closes the fleet operations box. Clicking on any fleet opens the box. You can re-open it and cycle to your "next" fleet, by pressing F2. Pressing F1 goes back one fleet. If you have no fleets, an enemy fleet may be substituted
column2: 關閉艦隊操作框。點擊任何艦隊即可開啟此框。您可以按 F2 重新開啟並循環切換至「下一支」艦隊,按 F1 則會返回上一支艦隊。若您沒有任何艦隊,可能會改以敵方艦隊替代顯示。

column1: If you have a Dimensional Portal, you may, at any time, send a fleet through the portal to attack the mighty Antaran empire. All ships selected will be sent at the start of the next turn.
column2: 若您擁有次元傳送門,您可以隨時派遣艦隊穿過傳送門攻擊強大的安塔蘭帝國。所有選定的船艦將於下一回合開始時出發。

column1: If you have a colony ship in the current fleet, you may use it to colonize any planet in the system you are orbiting. A system display will replace the fleet operations box. From this box, you will select a planet to colonize.
column2: 若目前艦隊中有殖民船,您可以用它殖民您所在星系中的任何行星。此時星系顯示畫面會取代艦隊操作框,您可以在此框中選擇要殖民的行星。

column1: You may engage enemy forces in the system you are orbiting by selecting this button. All selected ships will be sent into battle. The attack will be launched during the following turn.
column2: 選擇此按鈕即可與您所在星系中的敵方部隊交戰。所有選定的船艦都會投入戰鬥,攻擊將於下一回合發動。

column1: Selecting this button will unload your marines to reinforce a planet. You will be shown a special screen where you will be given limited control over the  bombarment
column2: 選擇此按鈕會卸載您的陸戰隊以增援某行星。系統會顯示一個特殊畫面,讓您對轟炸擁有有限的控制權。

column1: If you have an outpost ship in the fleet and are orbiting a system  containing at least one planet, you can place an outpost by selecting  this button. Building the outpost comsumes the ship. Outposts are helpful when you want to extend your range but don't want to force colonisists to live on a worthless rock-world
column2: 若艦隊中有前哨船,且您所在的星系至少含有一顆行星,選擇此按鈕即可設置前哨站。建造前哨站會消耗該船艦。當您想擴展航程範圍,卻不想強迫殖民者居住在毫無價值的岩石世界時,前哨站十分有用。

column1: From this box, ships will be given orders. To select or de-select a ship,  left-click on its picture. You can select or de-select more than one ship  by holding down the left mouse button and moving the mouse across all  ships you wish to select. Pressing the ALL button will toggle all ships  on and off. Detailed ship information can be obtained by right-clicking on the ship picture.
column2: 船艦的指令將在此框中下達。左鍵點擊船艦圖片即可選取或取消選取。按住滑鼠左鍵並拖曳滑過所有想選取的船艦,即可一次選取或取消選取多艘船艦。按下「全選」按鈕可切換全部船艦的選取狀態。在船艦圖片上按右鍵可取得詳細的船艦資訊。

column1: After you have selected one or more ships, you can send them to a star by  left-clicking on a destination star on the map. As you run your mouse over  a star, a line will be drawn from the fleet icon to the star. Green lines denote valid moves, red denotes invalid ones. A move may be invalid if the  destination is out of range, blocked by a black hole, etc. In the fleet operations box, look at the status line for more information.
column2: 選取一艘或多艘船艦後,您可以在地圖上左鍵點擊目的地恆星,將它們派遣過去。當滑鼠移到某顆恆星上時,系統會從艦隊圖示畫一條線連到該恆星。綠線代表有效的移動,紅線代表無效的移動。若目的地超出航程範圍、被黑洞阻擋等,移動可能會無效。詳情請參閱艦隊操作框中的狀態列。

column1: Once you click on a destination star, all selected ships will be  separated into another fleet as they depart the star. If multiple fleets  are leaving a star for separate destinations, they will overlap on the  main map. You may have to click on a fleet icon more than once to see all  fleets at a single location.
column2: 一旦您點擊目的地恆星,所有選定的船艦在離開該恆星時會被分離成另一支艦隊。若有多支艦隊從同一顆恆星出發前往不同目的地,它們會在主地圖上重疊顯示。您可能需要多次點擊艦隊圖示,才能看到同一地點的所有艦隊。

column1: Sends you to the Colony Leaders screen, where you can manage all the  colony leaders in your empire.
column2: 帶您前往殖民地領袖畫面,在此您可以管理帝國中所有的殖民地領袖。

column1: Sends you to the Ship Officers screen, where you can manage all the  ship officers in your empire.
column2: 帶您前往船艦軍官畫面,在此您可以管理帝國中所有的船艦軍官。
