column1: Shows the current star system. You can scan planets and fleets to get a brief description of each.
column2: 顯示目前的星系。您可以掃描行星與艦隊,取得各自的簡短說明。

column1:
This area lists all the colony leaders at your disposal. Each window shows one leader, his or her picture, and pertinent skills. You may press the RIGHT mouse button on each skill to get a brief description of each. If you press the RIGHT mouse button on the leader's picture, the star  system display will flip to the star where he or she is stationed. 

 If the leader has not been hired yet, you may attempt to hire him or her by pressing the LEFT mouse button while over the picture. 

 Once hired, you may assign the officer to a star system. When you select a leader (left-click on his or her picture), you are assigning him or her  to the star being displayed in the star system window. To change the star system, you must deselect the officer and select a different star system.
column2:
此區域列出所有可供您差遣的殖民地領袖。每個視窗顯示一位領袖、其圖片及相關技能。在每項技能上按滑鼠右鍵可取得簡短說明。若在領袖圖片上按滑鼠右鍵,星系顯示畫面會切換到他或她所在的恆星。

 若該領袖尚未被僱用,您可以將滑鼠移到圖片上並按左鍵嘗試僱用他或她。

 僱用後,您可以將該軍官指派至某個星系。選取領袖(在其圖片上按左鍵)時,即是將他或她指派至星系視窗目前顯示的恆星。若要更改星系,您必須先取消選取該軍官,再選擇不同的星系。

column1: Note that it takes an officer 5 turns to travel from star system to star system, or from the Pool to any star system. The Officer Pool exists on your home star, so travel from the Pool to your home star is instantaneous.
column2: 請注意,軍官從一個星系前往另一個星系,或從人才庫前往任一星系,都需要 5 個回合。軍官人才庫位於您的母星,因此從人才庫前往母星是即時完成的。

column1: This is where information will appear as you scan over fleets or planets in the star system display. If a star system has a leader assigned, his or her name will apear in parentheses
column2: 這裡是當您在星系顯示畫面中掃描艦隊或行星時,資訊顯示的地方。若某星系已指派領袖,他或她的名字會顯示於括號中。

column1: When you click this button, the star system display will "go back" one star in the list of all stars you have colonized.
column2: 點擊此按鈕時,星系顯示畫面會在您已殖民的所有恆星清單中「返回」上一顆恆星。

column1: When you click this button, the star system display will advance to the next star in the list of all stars you have colonized
column2: 點擊此按鈕時,星系顯示畫面會前進到您已殖民的所有恆星清單中的下一顆恆星。

column1: This is a scaled-down version of the entire galaxy. Stars are shown in the color of its owner, or in a neutral color if it is unowned or undiscovered. If a ship is within contact range, it will be shown here. As you scan  fleets and stars, a brief description is shown in the box below. If you select a star in this window, you will see the planets and their orbits in the  Star System display above.
column2: 這是整個銀河的縮小版顯示。恆星會以其所有者的顏色顯示,若無所有者或尚未發現,則以中性色顯示。若有船艦在接觸範圍內,也會顯示於此。當您掃描艦隊與恆星時,下方框中會顯示簡短說明。若您在此視窗中選取某顆恆星,上方的星系顯示畫面會顯示其行星及其軌道。

column1: As your mouse scans over fleets, information on scanned stars and ships appears here.
column2: 當您用滑鼠掃描艦隊時,已掃描恆星與船艦的資訊會顯示於此。

column1:
Officers that are initially REJECTED will be placed in a "Hiring Queue". They will stay in this queue for 30 turns, after which they will leave to search out better jobs. They may or may not return again. To place them into your service, you must actually "hire" them.

 Pressing the HIRE button places you in HIRE mode. While in this mode, you can scan over leader pictures and retrieve cost and maintenance  information about a particular leader. If you wish to hire a leader, select his or her picture. You must have enough BC's to cover the initial cost. Maintenance is subtracted each turn from your treasury. Hired officers are placed in your Officer Pool for later assignment.

 To exit HIRE mode, select the CANCEL button.
column2:
最初被「拒絕」的軍官會被列入「待僱佇列」。他們會在此佇列中停留 30 個回合,之後便會離開另謀高就,之後可能回來也可能不會。若要將他們納入麾下,您必須實際「僱用」他們。

 按下「僱用」按鈕會進入僱用模式。在此模式下,您可以掃描領袖圖片,取得特定領袖的費用與維護資訊。若您想僱用某位領袖,請選取其圖片,您必須擁有足夠的 BC 支付初始費用,維護費則會每回合從國庫中扣除。已僱用的軍官會被放入軍官人才庫,供日後指派。

 若要離開僱用模式,請選擇「取消」按鈕。

column1: Moves the officer from his/her current position into the Officer Pool. It does not take any time to move from a star system to the Pool.
column2: 將軍官從目前的位置移入軍官人才庫。從星系移動到人才庫不需花費任何時間。

column1: Officers may be dismissed at any time. Once dismissed, an officer is not gone for good, he/she may come back at a later time.
column2: 軍官可以隨時被解僱。一旦被解僱,並不代表永久離開,他/她日後仍可能回來。

column1: Pressing the RETURN button will exit the Leader screen.
column2: 按下「返回」按鈕將離開領袖畫面。

column1: Shows the current star system. You can scan planets and fleets to get a breif description of each.
column2: 顯示目前的星系。您可以掃描行星與艦隊,取得各自的簡短說明。

column1:
This area lists all the leaders at your disposal. Each window shows a leader, his/her picture, and pertinent skills. You may press the RIGHT mouse button on each skill to get a brief description of each. If you press the RIGHT mouse button on the leader's picture, the fleet  display will flip to the fleet where he/she is stationed. 

 If the leader has not been hired yet, you may attempt to hire him/her by press the LEFT mouse button while over the picture. 

 Once hired, you may assign the officer to a ship. After selecting a leader (left-click on his/her picture), a bright border will appear. Then, select any ship in your empire. If the ship is located in the same system as your home star, the assignment is instantaneous. Otherwise, it  will take 5 turns for the leader to travel to the ship. To select a ship from a fleet other than the one shown, either click on the ship in the galaxy map window, or use the left and right arrows to cycle through all your fleets.
column2:
此區域列出所有可供您差遣的領袖。每個視窗顯示一位領袖、其圖片及相關技能。在每項技能上按滑鼠右鍵可取得簡短說明。若在領袖圖片上按滑鼠右鍵,艦隊顯示畫面會切換到他/她所在的艦隊。

 若該領袖尚未被僱用,您可以將滑鼠移到圖片上並按左鍵嘗試僱用他/她。

 僱用後,您可以將該軍官指派至某艘船艦。選取領袖(在其圖片上按左鍵)後會出現亮框,接著選取帝國中任一船艦。若該船艦與您的母星位於同一星系,指派會立即生效;否則領袖需要 5 個回合才能抵達該船艦。若要選取目前顯示以外艦隊中的船艦,可在銀河地圖視窗中點擊該船艦,或使用左右箭頭在您所有艦隊間循環切換。

column1: This is where information will appear as you scan over ships in the current fleet. If a leader has been assigned, his/her name will apear in  parentheses.
column2: 這裡是當您掃描目前艦隊中的船艦時,資訊顯示的地方。若已指派領袖,他/她的名字會顯示於括號中。

column1: When you click this button, the display will "go back" one fleet in  the list of all fleets in your empire.
column2: 點擊此按鈕時,顯示畫面會在您帝國所有艦隊的清單中「返回」上一支艦隊。

column1: When you click this button, the fleet display will advance to the next fleet in the list of all fleet in your empire.
column2: 點擊此按鈕時,艦隊顯示畫面會前進到您帝國所有艦隊清單中的下一支艦隊。

column1: This is a scaled-down version of the entire galaxy. Stars are shown in the color of its owner, or in a neutral color if it is unowned or undiscovered. If a ship is within contact range, it will be shown here. As you scan  fleets and stars, a breif description is shown in the box below. If you select a fleet in this window, you will see each ship in that fleet displayed in  the fleet display above.
column2: 這是整個銀河的縮小版顯示。恆星會以其所有者的顏色顯示,若無所有者或尚未發現,則以中性色顯示。若有船艦在接觸範圍內,也會顯示於此。當您掃描艦隊與恆星時,下方框中會顯示簡短說明。若您在此視窗中選取某支艦隊,上方的艦隊顯示畫面會顯示該艦隊中的每艘船艦。

column1: Each ship in a fleet is displayed here. As you scan each ship, its name and leader will be seen in the box below. If you wish to assign a leader, you  may select a ship, then select any leader. You may "right-click" on a ship to get more detailed information.
column2: 艦隊中的每艘船艦都顯示於此。當您掃描每艘船艦時,其名稱與領袖會顯示於下方框中。若您想指派領袖,可以先選取船艦,再選取任一領袖。您可以對船艦按「右鍵」以取得更詳細的資訊。

column1: Use the up arrow the scroll up one row of ships.
column2: 使用向上箭頭可向上捲動一列船艦。

column1: Use the scroll bar to scroll quickly up and down the list of all ships in the current fleet.
column2: 使用捲軸可快速上下捲動目前艦隊中所有船艦的清單。

column1: Use the down arrow the scroll down one row of ships.
column2: 使用向下箭頭可向下捲動一列船艦。

column1: Here you will see a list of all known planets. The list can be  sorted by climate, size, or mineral abundance. If a SEND button is selected, the mouse pointer will either be a red circle with a line through it or an arrow pointing to a planet. The red circle indicates that you cannot  send a ship to this system. Once a SEND button has been selected, click on  any valid planet to deploy a ship to that system.
column2: 在此您會看到所有已知行星的清單,清單可依氣候、大小或礦產豐度排序。若選取了「派遣」按鈕,滑鼠指標會顯示為畫有斜線的紅色圓圈,或是指向行星的箭頭。紅色圓圈代表無法派遣船艦前往此星系。選取「派遣」按鈕後,點擊任一有效行星即可將船艦派往該星系。

column1: This column shows the planet in graphic representation, its name (in player colors) and any planet specials or guardian monsters
column2: 此欄顯示行星的圖形表示、其名稱(以玩家顏色顯示),以及任何行星特殊屬性或守護怪獸。

column1: This column shows the planet's CLIMATE and its effect on food production
column2: 此欄顯示行星的「氣候」及其對糧食生產的影響。

column1: This column shows the planet's GRAVITY and its effect on worker productivity
column2: 此欄顯示行星的「重力」及其對工人生產力的影響。

column1: This column shows the planet's MINERAL abundance and how it affects  the amount each worker can produce
column2: 此欄顯示行星的「礦產」豐度,以及它如何影響每位工人的產出量。

column1: This column shows the planet's SIZE and its effect on maximum population
column2: 此欄顯示行星的「大小」及其對最大人口數的影響。

column1: Within this window, you will see a representation of the entire galaxy. Each colony  ship in your fleet is represented as a "C". Each outpost ship is  represented as an "O". Destination lines show the current destination of  each ship. You may left-click on a star in the galaxy map to move the list  to the first planet in that system.
column2: 在此視窗中,您會看到整個銀河的示意圖。艦隊中的每艘殖民船以「C」表示,每艘前哨船以「O」表示。目的地連線會顯示每艘船艦目前的目的地。您可以在銀河地圖上左鍵點擊某顆恆星,將清單移至該星系的第一顆行星。

column1: As you move the mouse pointer over each star in the galaxy map, its name  will appear in the box below. Likewise, if you move the mouse over a planet in the list to the left, the name of the system will appear in the box. If  the "SEND COLONY SHIP" or "SEND OUTPOST SHIP" button is selected,  a destination line will be drawn from the closest colony or outpost ship, and travel time, in turns, will be displayed.
column2: 當您將滑鼠指標移到銀河地圖上的每顆恆星時,其名稱會顯示於下方框中。同樣地,若您將滑鼠移到左側清單中的行星上,該星系的名稱會顯示於框中。若選取了「派遣殖民船」或「派遣前哨船」按鈕,系統會從最近的殖民船或前哨船畫出一條目的地連線,並顯示以回合計算的航行時間。

column1: The scroll up button can be used to scroll up one line at a time
column2: 向上捲動按鈕可用來一次向上捲動一行。

column1: Use the scroll bar to scroll one screen at a time
column2: 使用捲軸可一次捲動一個畫面。

column1: The scroll down button can be used to scroll down one line at a time
column2: 向下捲動按鈕可用來一次向下捲動一行。

column1: When "Climate" sort is chosen, the list of known planets will be  sorted by food production, which is the effect different climates have on a planet.
column2: 選擇「氣候」排序時,已知行星清單會依糧食產量排序,即不同氣候對行星造成的影響。

column1: When "Mineral" sort is chosen, the list of known planets will be  sorted by worker productivity, which is the effect mineral abundance has on each planet.
column2: 選擇「礦產」排序時,已知行星清單會依工人生產力排序,即礦產豐度對各行星造成的影響。

column1: When "Size" sort is chosen, the list of known planets will be sorted by maximum population, which is the effect size has on each planet.
column2: 選擇「大小」排序時,已知行星清單會依最大人口數排序,即大小對各行星造成的影響。

column1: When this button is active, the list of known planets will be stripped of all planets that have an enemy presence in the system. An "enemy presence" is any enemy ship or monster orbiting the system.
column2: 啟用此按鈕時,已知行星清單會剔除所有星系中有敵方存在的行星。「敵方存在」是指任何在該星系中的敵方船艦或怪獸。

column1: When this button is active, the list of known planets will be stripped  of all planets that would receive a negative worker productivity bonus.
column2: 啟用此按鈕時,已知行星清單會剔除所有會使工人生產力獲得負面加成的行星。

column1: When this button is active, the list of known planets will be stripped  of all planets with a hostile climate. Hostile climates are those that do not produce food.
column2: 啟用此按鈕時,已知行星清單會剔除所有氣候惡劣的行星。惡劣氣候是指無法生產糧食的氣候。

column1: When this button is active, the list of known planets will be stripped  of all planets that have a low mineral abundance. These are planets that  do not have at least one production per worker.
column2: 啟用此按鈕時,已知行星清單會剔除所有礦產豐度過低的行星,即每位工人生產量不足 1 點的行星。

column1: When this button is active, the list of known planets will include planets that are in range of one of your colonies. You might want to turn this filter off to see which planets are nearby. As your fuel cell technology increases, or you expand out, more planets will be in range.
column2: 啟用此按鈕時,已知行星清單只會包含位於您某個殖民地航程範圍內的行星。您可能會想關閉此篩選,以查看附近有哪些行星。隨著燃料電池科技提升或帝國擴張,會有更多行星進入航程範圍。

column1: To send a colony ship to a system, you must activate this button. If the button  will not activate, then you have no colony ships to deploy.
column2: 若要派遣殖民船前往某星系,您必須啟用此按鈕。若此按鈕無法啟用,代表您沒有可派遣的殖民船。

column1: To send an outpost ship to a system, you must activate this button. If the button  will not activate, then you have no outpost ships to deploy.
column2: 若要派遣前哨船前往某星系,您必須啟用此按鈕。若此按鈕無法啟用,代表您沒有可派遣的前哨船。

column1: Pressing the RETURN button will exit the Planets screen and return you  to the main game screen.
column2: 按下「返回」按鈕將離開行星畫面,並回到遊戲主畫面。

column1:
The entire galaxy is displayed here. Each planet is represented in the  color of its owner. If a planet is unowned or undiscovered, it will appear in a neutral color. As the mouse pointer scans over each planet, its name will appear in the galaxy map description box below. If a leader has been assigned to the star, his/her name will appear in parenthesis.

  When the "Relocate" button has been selected, you will select source and destination stars from this window. 

  As you select individual ships from the grid to the right, you can assign  destinations by clicking on a star from this window. 

 A fleet will only appear in the galaxy map if it is within contact range. As your mouse pointer scans over each fleet, its owner will appear in the box below. As you select fleets from this window, they will be displayed in detail to the right.
column2:
整個銀河會顯示於此。每顆行星以其所有者的顏色表示,若行星無所有者或尚未發現,則以中性色顯示。當滑鼠指標掃描每顆行星時,其名稱會顯示於下方的銀河地圖說明框中。若某恆星已指派領袖,他/她的名字會顯示於括號中。

 選取「重新部署」按鈕後,您可以在此視窗中選擇出發與目的地恆星。

 當您從右側網格選取個別船艦時,可以在此視窗中點擊恆星以指派目的地。

 艦隊只有在接觸範圍內才會顯示於銀河地圖上。當滑鼠指標掃描每支艦隊時,其所有者會顯示於下方框中。當您在此視窗中選取艦隊時,會在右側顯示詳細資訊。

column1: From this window, each fleet will be displayed in detail. As you enter the screen, if you had a fleet selected in the "Fleet Movement" box on  the MAIN screen, it will be displayed here. Otherwise the first fleet in your empire will be displayed. \n\n By scanning each ship, you can get a short description in the ship  description to the lower left of this screen. By pressing the RIGHT mouse button while over any of your ships, you will get a more-detailed  description. After selecting ships from this grid, you may then give them "move" orders to any star within range by selecting a star from the  galaxy map window. If ships are selected as you scan stars, a green line indicates a valid destination. Red lines denote invalid destinations.
column2: 在此視窗中,每支艦隊會顯示詳細資訊。進入此畫面時,若您先前在主畫面「艦隊移動」框中選取了某支艦隊,該艦隊會顯示於此;否則會顯示帝國中的第一支艦隊。\n\n 掃描每艘船艦時,您可以在此畫面左下方的船艦說明中取得簡短說明。將滑鼠移到任一船艦上按右鍵,可取得更詳細的說明。從此網格中選取船艦後,您可以在銀河地圖視窗中選擇航程範圍內的恆星,對其下達「移動」指令。若已選取船艦並掃描恆星,綠線代表有效目的地,紅線代表無效目的地。

column1: Only sixteen ships may displayed at one time. If the fleet has in excess of sixteen ships, you may scroll up row of ships by selecting this button
column2: 一次最多只能顯示十六艘船艦。若艦隊中船艦數量超過十六艘,選擇此按鈕即可向上捲動一列船艦。

column1: Moving the scroll bar up and down is a quick way to adjust the current range of ships being displayed.
column2: 上下拖曳捲軸是快速調整目前顯示船艦範圍的方法。

column1: This window displays infomation as you scan ships and stars in the galaxy map window
column2: 此視窗顯示您在銀河地圖視窗中掃描船艦與恆星時的資訊。

column1: Pressing this button will "go back" one fleet in the list of all fleets in your empire. Note that as the filter buttons are selected,  a fleet may be skipped. For example, if you are filtering out combat ships,  then a fleet must contain at least one non-combat ship to be selected
column2: 按下此鈕會在您帝國所有艦隊清單中「回到」上一支艦隊。請注意,當篩選按鈕被選取時,某些艦隊可能會被跳過。例如,若您篩選掉戰鬥艦,則艦隊必須包含至少一艘非戰鬥艦才會被選取。

column1: Pressing this button will display the next fleet in your empire. Note  that as the filter buttons are selected, a fleet may be skipped. For example, if you are filtering out non-combat ships, then fleets containing at least one combat ship will be selected.
column2: 按下此鈕會顯示您帝國中的下一支艦隊。請注意,當篩選按鈕被選取時,某些艦隊可能會被跳過。例如,若您篩選掉非戰鬥艦,則包含至少一艘戰鬥艦的艦隊才會被選取。

column1: As you scan ships in the grid window to the right, a brief description of the ship will appear here. If a ship officer is on board, his/her picture will be displayed as well. For a more detailed description, press the  RIGHT mouse button when the pointer is over the ship (in the grid window).
column2: 當您瀏覽右方格狀視窗中的艦艇時,此處會顯示該艦艇的簡短說明。若艦上配有軍官,也會一併顯示他/她的畫像。如需更詳細的說明,請在格狀視窗中將指標移到該艦艇上並按滑鼠右鍵。

column1: If the fleet has in excess of sixteen ships, you may scroll down row  of ships by selecting this button.
column2: 若艦隊擁有超過十六艘艦艇,您可以按下此鈕向下捲動艦艇列。

column1: Pressing the ALL button will select all ships in the fleet
column2: 按下「全選」鈕會選取艦隊中的所有艦艇。

column1:
Pressing the RELOCATE button allows you to send ships built at one star to be given orders to move to another star. As soon as the ship construction is complete, the ship will be given orders to move to a destination star. The travel time does not change. Be warned that the ships will be sent irrespective of the conditions at the destination  star. Which, is to say, that if there are enemy ships or enemy star bases there, combat will ensue.

 You may cancel relocation orders at star by selecting the the same  source and destination stars. You may cancel all relocation orders by pressing ALT-F5.

 You may direct all ships built to be sent to the same star by pressing F4 and then selecting destination star.

 Pressing the RELOCATE button again will take you out of relocation mode.
column2:
按下「移防」鈕可讓您將某星系建造完成的艦艇下令移動至另一個星系。艦艇一旦建造完成,便會立即接獲前往目標星系的命令。航行時間不會因此改變。請注意,無論目標星系當時情況如何,艦艇都會照樣派出——也就是說,若當地有敵艦或敵方星際基地,將會引發戰鬥。

 您可以在同一星系選擇相同的起點與終點來取消該星系的移防命令。按下 ALT-F5 可取消所有移防命令。

 按下 F4 後選擇目的星系,可將所有建造完成的艦艇統一導向同一星系。

 再次按下「移防」鈕會離開移防模式。

column1: This button allows you to scrap one or more ships. First, select the ships you want the scrap and press the SCRAP button. Your treasury will increase by the scrap value of each ship. In addition, as you dismantle captured enemy ships, there is a chance you will be able to learn new technology. This is the ONLY way you can learn ANTARAN technology!
column2: 此鈕可讓您報廢一艘或多艘艦艇。請先選取要報廢的艦艇,再按下「報廢」鈕。您的國庫將依每艘艦艇的報廢價值增加。此外,當您拆解擄獲的敵艦時,有機會學到新科技——這是您唯一能學到安塔蘭(ANTARAN)科技的方法!

column1: This button takes you to the Officer Screen, where you can manage all the officers in your empire. This button will be inactive if you have no officers.
column2: 此鈕會帶您前往軍官畫面,您可在此管理帝國中所有的軍官。若您沒有任何軍官,此鈕將無法使用。

column1: The support button allows you to determine whether support (non-combat) ships appear in the ship grid window above. If the button is lit,  support ships will be shown. Additionally, if this button is NOT lit, fleets with only support ships will be skipped as you cycle through all fleets
column2: 「後勤」鈕可決定上方艦艇格狀視窗中是否顯示後勤(非戰鬥)艦艇。若此鈕亮起,後勤艦艇便會顯示;若此鈕未亮起,則在您逐一瀏覽艦隊時,只有後勤艦艇的艦隊將會被跳過。

column1: The support button allows you to determine whether combat ships appear  in the ship grid window above. If the button is lit, combat ships will  be shown. Additionally, if this button is NOT lit, fleets with only combat ships will be skipped as you cycle through all fleets.
column2: 「戰鬥」鈕可決定上方艦艇格狀視窗中是否顯示戰鬥艦艇。若此鈕亮起,戰鬥艦艇便會顯示;若此鈕未亮起,則在您逐一瀏覽艦隊時,只有戰鬥艦艇的艦隊將會被跳過。

column1: Pressing the RETURN button will exit the Fleet screen and return you  to the main game screen.
column2: 按下「返回」鈕會離開艦隊畫面,回到遊戲主畫面。

column1: Click here to change the name of your ship, up to a maximum of 14  characters.
column2: 點選此處可變更艦艇名稱,最多可輸入 14 個字元。

column1:
The left panel shows the current drive and armor type. Hyperspace drives have two pertinent pieces of data -- distance (parsecs/turn) and combat speed.  Distance is used outside of combat and determines the maximum distance your ship can travel in one turn. Fuel Cell technology also affects distance.  Combat speed determines how far your ship can travel in one combat round.

 Armor is non-ablative and provides basic protection in two ways. It can  reinforce the hull, allowing it to take more structural points before the ship is destroyed. It will provide sturdy outer shell, which must be pierced before internal damage can be done. 

 Each ship will be fitted with the best armor and hyperspace drives  available.
column2:
左側面板顯示目前的引擎與裝甲類型。超空間引擎有兩項相關數據——距離(秒差距/回合)與戰鬥速度。距離用於戰鬥之外,決定艦艇每回合可航行的最大距離;燃料電池科技也會影響距離。戰鬥速度則決定艦艇在每個戰鬥回合中可移動的距離。

 裝甲屬非削蝕式,以兩種方式提供基本防護:一是強化船體,使艦艇在被摧毀前能承受更多結構點數;二是提供堅固外殼,必須先被擊穿才能對內部造成傷害。 

 每艘艦艇都會裝配當時可取得的最佳裝甲與超空間引擎。

column1:
The right panel shows information on shields, computers, and ship combat modifiers. Shields protect the ship from incoming missile, torpedo, and beam fire. The strength of the shield is ablative. As each shield takes damage, its strength is reduced. When the strength reaches 0, armor points are reduced. The class rating of a shield is important in that this is the amount of damage taken off EACH attack as long as the shield generator is working. This amount comes off BEFORE any damage  is done to shield strength. So, even if the strength of a shield is 0,  as long as the shield generator is intact, a class 5 shield takes off 5 points of damage. 

 Each ship equipped with shields has 4 shields spread in 90-degree arcs. 

 Computers make it easy to hit with all beam weapons. 

 Missile evasion refers to the ship's ability to dodge incoming missiles. Each point reduces the chance to hit by 1. So that 50% evasion reduces each missile's chance to hit by 50.
column2:
右側面板顯示護盾、電腦與艦艇戰鬥修正值的相關資訊。護盾可保護艦艇免受來襲飛彈、魚雷與光束武器攻擊。護盾強度屬削蝕式,每次受創其強度便會降低。強度降至 0 時,傷害將開始削減裝甲點數。護盾的等級評分十分重要,只要護盾產生器仍在運作,每次攻擊都會先扣除相當於等級數值的傷害,此扣減發生在對護盾強度造成任何傷害「之前」。因此即使護盾強度已降至 0,只要護盾產生器完好,5 級護盾仍會為每次攻擊抵銷 5 點傷害。 

 每艘配備護盾的艦艇都有 4 具護盾,分別涵蓋 90 度的防護弧。 

 電腦可提高所有光束武器的命中率。 

 飛彈迴避是指艦艇閃避來襲飛彈的能力,每一點可降低 1％ 的命中機率。因此 50% 的迴避率會使每枚飛彈的命中機率降低 50％。

column1:
The following table shows hull sizes and pertinent data:

 \x07X3.Hull Size \x07X95.Space \x07X150.Marines \x07X212.Armor \x07X265.Structure 
 \x07X3.Frigate \x07X105.25 \x07X165.5 \x07X222.4 \x07X275.4 
 \x07X3.Destroyer \x07X105.60 \x07X165.8 \x07X222.10 \x07X275.10 
 \x07X3.Cruiser * \x07X105.120 \x07X165.12 \x07X222.30 \x07X275.30 
 \x07X3.Battleship * \x07X105.250 \x07X165.20 \x07X222.50 \x07X275.50 
 \x07X3.Titan * \x07X105.500 \x07X165.30 \x07X222.150 \x07X275.150 
 \x07X3.Doom Star * \x07X105.1200 \x07X165.50 \x07X222.150 \x07X275.150 

           * Ships larger than destroyers can only be built on planets with a star base, battle station,  or star fortress. In addition, certain technology is required to build Titan and Doom Star class ships
This window shows which icon will represent your ship in the game.
column2: 此視窗顯示將代表您艦艇的遊戲圖示。

column1: You can "go back" one picture in the list by pressing this button.
column2: 按下此鈕可在清單中「回到」上一張圖示。

column1: You can show the next ship picture in the list by pressing this button.
column2: 按下此鈕可顯示清單中的下一張艦艇圖示。

column1: This window shows the maximum space allowed for the current class of ships. To change the class, select a size from the buttons to the right.
column2: 此視窗顯示目前艦級所允許的最大空間。若要更改艦級,請從右方按鈕中選擇大小。

column1: This area shows the weapons currently loaded onto your ship. Just to the  left of each weapon name, + and - buttons allow you to change the number of weapons mounted in each slot. To the right, you will see a brief overview of each weapon, including damage, arcs of fire, cost, space, and any special effects. Bear in mind this data refers to ONE weapon, so that if you have 10 weapons mounted, each taking up 5 space, the whole slot takes up 50 space.
column2: 此區域顯示您艦艇目前裝載的武器。每個武器名稱左側的 + 與 - 鈕可用來調整該武器槽裝載的數量。右側則會顯示每種武器的簡要概覽,包括傷害、射角、成本、空間及任何特殊效果。請注意,這些數據都是以「單一」武器為準,因此若您裝載 10 件武器、每件佔用 5 空間,則整個武器槽會佔用 50 空間。

column1:
To add extra weapons, click in the open area just below the last weapon  displayed, if any. The words "Add new weapon" will appear. If these words do not appear, then you are unable to add any more weapons, due to space restrictions. You may only have 8 different types of weapons on each ship. 

 To replace a weapon, click on its slot. The weapon text will highlight just before you click. Whether you click on an open slot or an occupied slot, you will then see a list of available weapons. 

 If you to clear a weapon slot, select "NO WEAPON" on the list of  available weapons.
column2:
若要新增武器,請點選目前顯示的最後一項武器下方的空白區域(若有的話),此時會出現「新增武器」字樣。若未出現此字樣,表示因空間限制無法再新增武器——每艘艦艇最多只能裝載 8 種不同類型的武器。 

 若要更換武器,請點選該武器槽,點選前該武器文字會先反白顯示。無論您點選的是空槽或已佔用的槽位,都會顯示可用武器清單。 

 若要清空武器槽,請在可用武器清單中選擇「無武器」。

column1: This window will show any special systems currently on your ship. By clicking on an open slot, watch for the words "Add New Special System" to appear before clicking. Like weapons, if you select an occupied slot, you will be replacing the system with a new one. When replacing a system,  if you select "No System" on the list of available systems, the slot will be cleared.
column2: 此視窗會顯示您艦艇目前裝載的所有特殊系統。點選空槽時,請留意在點選前是否出現「新增特殊系統」字樣。如同武器一樣,若您選取已佔用的槽位,將以新系統取代原本的系統。更換系統時,若在可用系統清單中選擇「無系統」,該槽位便會被清空。

column1: Click the CANCEL button to exit without adding a special system.
column2: 按下「取消」鈕可不新增特殊系統並直接離開。

column1: Clicking the Clear button cancels all modifications you have made to  the current design and starts with a new, empty design template.
column2: 點選「清除」鈕會取消您對目前設計所做的所有修改,並以全新的空白設計範本重新開始。

column1: To cancel the current design and undo all changes, click the Cancel button. After clicking the cancel button, you will return to the Colony Build screen.
column2: 若要取消目前的設計並復原所有變更,請點選「取消」鈕。按下取消鈕後,您將回到殖民地建造畫面。

column1:
When you click the Build button, your current design will be saved.

 You will be taken to the Colony Build screen, where you must then add the  designed ship to the list of buildings and ships to be built. 

 If you try to put too much equipment on a ship, space available falls below 0, and you will be unable to complete the design. The Build button will be unselectable.
column2:
點選「建造」鈕後,您目前的設計將被儲存。

 您會被帶往殖民地建造畫面,此時您必須將設計好的艦艇加入待建造的建築與艦艇清單中。 

 若您試圖在艦艇上裝載過多裝備,導致剩餘空間降到 0 以下,將無法完成設計,「建造」鈕也會無法選取。

column1: Cost of the ship in production points.
column2: 艦艇以生產點數計算的建造成本。

column1: Amount of space left in the current design. This value is updated and made  available in the background as you replace weapons and special systems. If this number is below 0, you will not be able to complete the design, and the BUILD button will appear dimmed.
column2: 目前設計中剩餘的空間量。當您更換武器或特殊系統時,此數值會即時在背景更新。若此數字降到 0 以下,您將無法完成設計,「建造」鈕也會顯示為灰階無法使用。

column1: When this button is selected, all BEAM weapons are removed from the list of  weapon replacements.
column2: 選取此鈕後,所有「光束」武器將從可更換武器清單中移除。

column1: When this button is selected, all MISSILE weapons are removed from the list of  weapon replacements.
column2: 選取此鈕後,所有「飛彈」武器將從可更換武器清單中移除。

column1: When this button is selected, all BOMB weapons are removed from the list of  weapon replacements.
column2: 選取此鈕後,所有「炸彈」武器將從可更換武器清單中移除。

column1: When this button is selected, all SPECIAL DEVICE weapons are removed from  the list of weapon replacements.
column2: 選取此鈕後,所有「特殊裝置」武器將從可更換武器清單中移除。

column1: Selecting this button will cancel the current weapon choice and return to the main design screen. You may also cancel by clicking outside the  replacement box.
column2: 選取此鈕會取消目前的武器選擇,並返回主設計畫面。您也可以點選更換視窗外側來取消。

column1: Selecting this button, or clicking on a selecting weapon, will accept the  current weapon choice and return to the main design screen. If you select NO WEAPON the current weapon design slot will be cleared.
column2: 選取此鈕,或點選欲選擇的武器,將確認目前的武器選擇並返回主設計畫面。若您選擇「無武器」,目前的武器設計槽將被清空。

column1: Weapon arcs are changed by selecting arcs from this menu. Arcs are in 120 degrees extending from the FORWARD, FORWARD-EXTENDED, BACK, AND BACK-EXTENDED areas of the ship. You may have only one arc per weapon. Note that missiles and torpedoes have 360 degree (FULL) weapon arcs.
column2: 武器射角可從此選單中選擇變更。射角以 120 度為單位,涵蓋艦艇的「前方」、「前方延伸」、「後方」與「後方延伸」區域。每件武器只能設定一個射角。請注意,飛彈與魚雷的射角為 360 度(全方位)。

column1: Missiles and torpedoes have racks. Each rack stores one missile volley. As you fire missiles, one volley of missiles get expended. When you are out of volleys, you may not fire that missile weapon again until the next combat.
column2: 飛彈與魚雷配有發射架,每具發射架儲存一輪飛彈齊射。每次發射飛彈,便會用掉一輪齊射;當齊射用盡後,該飛彈武器將無法再次發射,須等到下一場戰鬥才會補充。

column1: Weapons may be modified to enhance their effectiveness. You must first have  researched the modifications for the particular weapon, and not all weapons  allow all modifications. The abbreviation for each modification appears in parentheses.
column2: 武器可透過改裝來提升效能。您必須先研究出該武器適用的改裝項目,且並非所有武器都允許所有改裝。每種改裝的縮寫會顯示在括號中。

column1: Heavy Mount (HV) weapons are larger platform versions of the normal weapon,  inflicting one and a half times the normal amount of damage, halving the actual range for purposes of dissipation and to hit penalties, and requiring double the base amount of space and cost. Heavy mount weapons can not fire at missiles or fighters due to their slow targeting.  Heavy mount and point defense are mutually exclusive.
column2: 重型架台(HV)武器是一般武器的大型化版本,可造成一般武器 1.5 倍的傷害,但在計算能量衰減與命中率懲罰時,實際射程會減半,且所需的基礎空間與成本皆為雙倍。由於瞄準速度較慢,重型架台武器無法對飛彈或戰鬥機開火。重型架台與近迫防禦互斥,不可同時選用。

column1: Point Defense weapons take up only half the normal amount of space normally  required and cost half the normal amount, but inflict only half damage. Furthermore, the  effective range is doubled for purposes of computing the energy dissipation and to hit  penalties, but point defense weapons have a +25% bonus to hit.  Finally, point defense  weapons will always fire just before a missile hits a ship or fighters engage the ship if  the point defense weapons have not yet fired.  Heavy Mount and Point Defense are  mutually exclusive.
column2: 近迫防禦武器僅需一般武器一半的空間與成本,但傷害也只有一半。此外,在計算能量衰減與命中率懲罰時,其有效射程會加倍,且擁有 +25% 的命中加成。最後,只要近迫防禦武器尚未開火,便一定會在飛彈擊中艦艇或戰鬥機接戰前自動開火。重型架台與近迫防禦互斥,不可同時選用。

column1: Armor piercing weapons automatically penetrate any type of armor except  xentronium, damaging the ships structure and internals directly.  Armor piercing increases the size and cost of a weapon system by +50% and requires 1 level of  refinement to be used.
column2: 穿甲武器會自動穿透除氙特隆合金(xentronium)以外的所有裝甲類型,直接對艦艇結構與內部造成傷害。穿甲改裝會使武器系統的體積與成本增加 50%,且需要 1 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Continuous allows a beam weapon to fire over a longer duration, increasing the  weapons chance to hit by +25. Continuous increases the size and cost of a weapon  system by +50% and requires 1 level of refinement to be used.
column2: 連續射擊可讓光束武器以更長的持續時間開火,使武器命中率提升 +25。連續射擊改裝會使武器系統的體積與成本增加 50%,且需要 1 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Not Reduced By Range applies to energy weapons and torpedoes that diminish in strength by  range. By focusing the beam and eliminating the decrease in damage. No range  dissipation increases the size and cost of a weapon system by +25%, and requires 1  level of refinement to employ.
column2: 不受射程衰減適用於威力會隨射程遞減的能量武器與魚雷,透過聚焦光束來消除傷害隨射程降低的效果。此改裝會使武器系統的體積與成本增加 25%,且需要 1 級精煉方可採用。

column1: Shield Piercing allows the weapon to ignore all aspects of shield. Shield piercing  requires +50% more space and cost, and cannot be used until 1 levels of refinement  have been achieved with a weapon.
column2: 穿盾可讓武器無視護盾的所有效果。穿盾改裝需要多耗費 50% 的空間與成本,且該武器須達到 1 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Autofire allows the weapon to fire 3 separate times in rapid succession,  each with a -20% chance to hit. Autofire increase the size and cost of a weapon  system by +50% and requires 2 levels of refinement to be used.
column2: 自動連射可讓武器連續快速開火 3 次,但每次命中率各降低 -20%。自動連射改裝會使武器系統的體積與成本增加 50%,且需要 2 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Enveloping surrounds the target with the blast and strikes to all four sides of  the ship, simultaneously. Enveloping increases the size and cost of a weapon by  +100% and requires 2 levels of refinement to employ.
column2: 包覆爆炸會以爆炸包圍目標,同時擊中艦艇的四個方向。此改裝會使武器的體積與成本增加 100%,且需要 2 級精煉方可採用。

column1: Mirv missiles carry 4 separate warheads, which separate from the missile just  before impact. Mirv missiles increase the size and cost of a weapon system by +100%  and requires 2 levels of refinement to be used.
column2: 集束彈頭(MIRV)飛彈搭載 4 枚獨立彈頭,會在擊中目標前一刻與飛彈本體分離。此改裝會使武器系統的體積與成本增加 100%,且需要 2 級精煉方可使用。

column1: ECCM missiles equipped with electronic counter measures, halve the chance of  a missile being jammed by enemy electronic counter measures. ECCM increases the size  and cost of a missile by +25% and requires 1 level of refinement to be used.
column2: 電子反反制(ECCM)可為飛彈配備電子反制裝置,使飛彈遭敵方電子反制干擾的機率減半。此改裝會使飛彈的體積與成本增加 25%,且需要 1 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Armored missiles are take twice the amount of damage to destroy. Armored  increase the cost and space of a missile by +25%  and require 1 level of  refinement to be used.
column2: 裝甲飛彈需承受兩倍的傷害才會被摧毀。此改裝會使飛彈的成本與體積增加 25%,且需要 1 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Fast Missiles increase the speed of a missile in combat by +4. There is also a  corresponding increase in the missile's defense. Fast missiles increase the cost and  space of a missile by +25% and require 1 level of refinement to be used.
column2: 高速飛彈可使飛彈在戰鬥中的速度提升 +4,同時飛彈的防禦力也會相應提升。此改裝會使飛彈的成本與體積增加 25%,且需要 1 級精煉方可使用。

column1: Overloaded increases the warhead strength of torpedoes by +50%, with a  corresponding increase in size and cost by +50%. Overloaded requires 1 level of  refinement to employ.
column2: 超載可使魚雷的彈頭威力提升 +50%,同時體積與成本也會相應增加 50%。此改裝需要 1 級精煉方可採用。

column1: Clicking here will exit the popup and send you back to the MAIN screen. If you are on the SETTINGS popup, all settings will be saved.
column2: 點選此處會關閉彈出視窗並回到主畫面。若您位於「設定」彈出視窗,所有設定都會被儲存。

column1: Displays the SAVE game screen, where you can save the current game.
column2: 顯示「儲存遊戲」畫面,您可在此儲存目前的遊戲進度。

column1: Displays the LOAD game screen, where you can load a previously-saved game. Note that in multi-player games, this option is disabled. You may only load multi-players games from the main menu.
column2: 顯示「讀取遊戲」畫面,您可在此讀取先前儲存的遊戲。請注意,在多人遊戲中此選項無法使用,多人遊戲僅能從主選單讀取。

column1: Leaves the current game and takes you to the NEW game screen where you will be able to start a the game anew.
column2: 離開目前的遊戲,帶您前往「新遊戲」畫面,讓您能夠重新開始一場新遊戲。

column1: Quits Master of Orion II
column2: 離開《銀河霸主 2》(Master of Orion II)。

column1: To change the music volume, position the mouse over the bar and press the  left mouse button. The further to the right you press, the higher the  music. You can hold the mouse button down and drag the bar to get a good feel for how loud you want the music. If the bar is placed close to the left, the music will turn off.
column2: 若要調整音樂音量,請將滑鼠移到音量條上並按下左鍵。按得越靠右,音樂音量越大。您也可以按住滑鼠左鍵拖曳音量條,以掌握音量大小的感覺。若音量條移到接近最左側,音樂將會關閉。

column1: To change the sound effects volume, position the mouse over the bar and  press the left mouse button. The further to the right you press, the  higher the sound effects. You can hold the mouse button down and drag the  bar to get a good feel for how loud you want the sound effects. If the  bar is placed close to the left, the sound effects will turn off.
column2: 若要調整音效音量,請將滑鼠移到音量條上並按下左鍵。按得越靠右,音效音量越大。您也可以按住滑鼠左鍵拖曳音量條,以掌握音量大小的感覺。若音量條移到接近最左側,音效將會關閉。

column1: To change the current game settings, press this button.
column2: 若要變更目前的遊戲設定,請按下此鈕。

column1: To return to the main screen, press this button
column2: 若要返回主畫面,請按下此鈕

column1: To load a game, click on the desired slot. The slot must have a  valid entry. Entries listed as "empty" cannot be loaded.
column2: 若要讀取遊戲,請點選欲讀取的存檔欄位,該欄位必須有有效的存檔紀錄。標示為「空白」的欄位無法讀取。

column1: If you decide not to load a game, click on this button. You will be sent back to the main GAME screen.
column2: 若您決定不讀取遊戲,請點選此鈕。您將被送回遊戲主畫面。

column1: Clicking on the load button will load the game which is highlighted. When  you save a game, the slot number is saved, so that you can "quick-load" the last saved game. You can quick-load using "GLL" keystrokes from the main menu.
column2: 點選「讀取」鈕會讀取目前反白顯示的存檔。當您儲存遊戲時,該欄位編號也會一併記錄,讓您可以「快速讀取」最後一次儲存的進度。您可以在主選單中依序按下「G」「L」「L」鍵來快速讀取。

column1: Click on a slot to save the game. You will be given the chance to enter a 25 character description. Press ENTER or click on the SAVE button to save the game. If you double-click on the same slot, the game will be saved with the same description.
column2: 點選任一欄位即可儲存遊戲,系統會讓您輸入一段最多 25 個字元的說明文字。按下 ENTER 鍵或點選「儲存」鈕即可完成儲存。若您在同一欄位上按兩下,遊戲將以相同的說明文字儲存。

column1: Clicking on the save button will save the game which is highlighted. When  you save a game, the slot number is saved, so that you can "quick-load" the last saved game. You can quick-save using "GSS" keystrokes from the main menu.
column2: 點選「儲存」鈕會將遊戲儲存至目前反白顯示的欄位。當您儲存遊戲時,該欄位編號也會一併記錄,讓您可以「快速讀取」最後一次儲存的進度。您可以在主選單中依序按下「G」「S」「S」鍵來快速儲存。

column1: When this option is ON, the player is given an end-of-turn summary. New ships and buildings built, new discoveries, and player contacts are all  examples of what might appear in the summary. Some information, such as starvation and negative income, will always be dispalyed.
column2: 啟用此選項時,玩家會在每回合結束時收到摘要報告。新建成的艦艇與建築、新發現,以及與其他玩家的接觸,都是可能出現在摘要中的範例。部分資訊(如飢荒與負收入)則一律會顯示。

column1: When this option is ON, each time the player clicks the TURN button,  one turn is executed. When end-of-turn-wait is OFF, one click of the  TURN button will cause successive turns to go by until "something interesting happens". Any end-of-turn-summary report or GNN report stops the turns from executing automatically. Alternatively, you may click anywhere on the screen to stop the automatic turn sequence.
column2: 啟用此選項時,玩家每按一次「回合」鈕,便會執行一個回合。若「回合結束等待」關閉,按一次「回合」鈕會連續執行多個回合,直到「發生有趣的事」為止。任何回合結束摘要報告或 GNN 新聞快報都會自動停止連續執行回合;您也可以點選畫面任意處來中止自動連續回合。

column1: If ON this option allows you to see the enemy moves.
column2: 啟用此選項可讓您看到敵方的行動。

column1: When turned ON, the fleet movement and system display boxes explode out when opened.
column2: 啟用此選項時,艦隊移動與星系顯示視窗在開啟時會以展開動畫呈現。

column1: When turned ON, this option selects all ships in the fleet when the box is first opened.
column2: 啟用此選項時,視窗首次開啟時會自動選取艦隊中的所有艦艇。

column1: When turned ON, all frames of each animation is played out. To skip the cinematics, and speed up play, turn this option OFF.
column2: 啟用此選項時,每段動畫的所有畫格都會完整播放。若要略過過場動畫以加快遊戲節奏,請關閉此選項。

column1: When ON, this option bypasses the System Display box and displays colony information for the last colony selected.
column2: 啟用此選項時,將略過星系顯示視窗,直接顯示上次選取殖民地的資訊。

column1: When a star has its ship production relocated to another star, a line will appear, connecting the two stars, in dark green.
column2: 當某星系的艦艇生產被移防至另一星系時,兩個星系之間會出現一條深綠色連線。

column1: When ON, the reports will be interrupted to show the GNN screen. If you turn this option off, you will still be notified of special events as  part of the normal turn summary.
column2: 啟用此選項時,報告過程會中斷以顯示 GNN 新聞畫面。若關閉此選項,特殊事件仍會列在一般的回合摘要中通知您。

column1: When this option is turned on, housing and trade goods will be deleted from the building list if it appears before another application.
column2: 啟用此選項時,若住宅與貿易商品出現在建造清單中其他項目之前,將會被自動移除。

column1: When this option is turned on, every 4 turns the game will be saved to the  last save slot (SAVE10.GAM). When you select "Continue" from the MAIN MENU  screen, this is the game that will be loaded. If you do not wish to save the  game in this manner, turn this option off.
column2: 啟用此選項時,每 4 回合遊戲便會自動儲存至最後一個存檔欄位(SAVE10.GAM)。當您在主選單選擇「繼續」時,讀取的就是這個存檔。若不希望以此方式自動儲存,請關閉此選項。

column1: When this option is turned on, you will receive a turn summary only if it contains serious reports e.g. starvation, rebellions, and forced scrapping due  to lack of BC's to pay maintenance.
column2: 啟用此選項時,只有在回合摘要包含嚴重報告(例如飢荒、叛亂,以及因缺乏 BC 支付維護費而被迫報廢)時,您才會收到該摘要。

column1: When this option is turned on, ships in tactical combat move in order of their initiative, from highest to lowest. A ship's initiative is equal to its modified beam offense bonus divided by 10 plus the ship's current combat speed.
column2: 啟用此選項時,戰術戰鬥中的艦艇將依先攻值由高到低依序行動。艦艇的先攻值等於其修正後的光束攻擊加成除以 10,再加上該艦艇目前的戰鬥速度。

column1: Press the accept button when you are done changing the game options. You will be sent back to the main GAME screen.
column2: 完成遊戲選項變更後,請按下「確認」鈕,您將被送回遊戲主畫面。

column1: These bonuses affect the rate at which the population grows.  The amount of population growth is  multiplied by this bonus.  Low population growth rates are a result of shorter life spans, health weakness,  etc., while higher growth rates result from the opposite.  Population growth modifiers include -50% growth  [-4], +50% growth [3], +100% growth [6].
column2: 此加成會影響人口成長的速度,人口成長量會乘上此加成值。人口成長率偏低源自壽命較短、體質較弱等因素,成長率偏高則反之。人口成長修正值包括:成長 -50%〔-4〕、成長 +50%〔3〕、成長 +100%〔6〕。

column1: Farming bonuses affect the amount of food that each farmer can grow.  Races with farming bonuses have  developed advanced agricultural techniques, while races with penalties lack farming aptitude.  Races with  farming penalties cannot be reduced below 1 food per farmer if the world has any life bearing  environment.  Farming modifiers include -1/2 food [-3], +1 food [4], +2 food [7].
column2: 農業加成會影響每位農夫可生產的糧食量。擁有農業加成的種族已發展出先進的農耕技術,而受農業懲罰的種族則缺乏農耕天賦。只要行星具備適宜生存的環境,受農業懲罰的種族每位農夫的糧食產量都不會低於 1。農業修正值包括:糧食 -1/2〔-3〕、糧食 +1〔4〕、糧食 +2〔7〕。

column1: Industry bonuses affect the amount of production that each factory worker can produce. Races with  industry bonuses have developed advanced manufacturing techniques, while races with penalties lack  manufacturing aptitude.  Races with industrial penalties cannot be reduced below 1 unit of production per  worker.  Industry modifiers include -1 production [-3], +1 production [3], +2 production [6].
column2: 工業加成會影響每位工廠工人可產出的生產力。擁有工業加成的種族已發展出先進的製造技術,而受工業懲罰的種族則缺乏製造天賦。受工業懲罰的種族每位工人的生產力都不會低於 1 單位。工業修正值包括:生產力 -1〔-3〕、生產力 +1〔3〕、生產力 +2〔6〕。

column1: Science bonuses affect the amount of research that each scientist  generates.  Races with science bonuses  have developed advanced research techniques, while races with penalties lack scientific aptitude.  Races  with science penalties cannot be reduced below 1 unit of research per scientist.  Science modifiers include   -1 research [-3], +1 research [3], +2 research [6].
column2: 科學加成會影響每位科學家可產出的研究量。擁有科學加成的種族已發展出先進的研究技術,而受科學懲罰的種族則缺乏科學天賦。受科學懲罰的種族每位科學家的研究產量都不會低於 1 單位。科學修正值包括:研究 -1〔-3〕、研究 +1〔3〕、研究 +2〔6〕。

column1: Money bonuses affect the amount in credits a population can be taxed.  Races with monetary bonuses  have developed advanced commercial concepts, while races with penalties lack economic skills.  Monetary modifiers include -0.5 BC [-4], +0.5 BC [5], +1 BC [8].
column2: 金錢加成會影響可對人口課徵的星幣稅收多寡。擁有金錢加成的種族已發展出先進的商業觀念,而受金錢懲罰的種族則缺乏經濟技能。金錢修正值包括:星幣 -0.5〔-4〕、星幣 +0.5〔5〕、星幣 +1〔8〕。

column1: Ship Defense bonuses decrease the chances of enemy fire hitting you in ship to ship combat.  Races with  bonuses in defense have developed keen evasion senses and have a much better chance of misleading an  attacker.  Penalties, on the other hand, indicate the race has difficulty visualizing complex 3 dimensional  motions.  Defense modifiers include -20 defense [-2], +25 defense [3], +50 defense [7].
column2: 艦艇防禦加成可降低艦對艦戰鬥中被敵方火力命中的機率。擁有防禦加成的種族已發展出敏銳的迴避感知,能大幅提高誤導攻擊者的機會;反之,受懲罰的種族則難以掌握複雜的三維運動軌跡。防禦修正值包括:防禦 -20〔-2〕、防禦 +25〔3〕、防禦 +50〔7〕。

column1: Ship Attack bonuses improve the chances of a ship engaged in combat to hit its target.  Races with  bonuses have developed the ability to anticipate a target's motion, and have a much better chance of hitting  the target.  Penalties, on the other hand, indicate a race with poor depth perception and tracking skills.   Attack modifiers include -20 attack [-2], +20 attack [2], +50 attack [4].
column2: 艦艇攻擊加成可提升參戰艦艇命中目標的機率。擁有加成的種族已發展出預判目標動向的能力,命中目標的機率大幅提高;反之,受懲罰的種族則深度知覺與追蹤能力較差。攻擊修正值包括:攻擊 -20〔-2〕、攻擊 +20〔2〕、攻擊 +50〔4〕。

column1: Ground Combat bonuses affect the combat effectiveness of troops engaged in planetary combat or ship  boarding actions. Higher bonuses are normally indicative of races with extraordinary strength and agility,  while lower combat bonuses indicate the lack thereof.  Ground combat modifiers include -10 [-2], +10 [2],  +20 [4]
column2: 地面戰鬥加成會影響參與行星戰鬥或艦艇跳幫作戰部隊的戰鬥效能。較高的加成通常代表該種族擁有超凡的力量與敏捷,較低的加成則反之。地面戰鬥修正值包括:-10〔-2〕、+10〔2〕、+20〔4〕。

column1: Spying bonuses affect the sabotage and espionage skills of a race.  Races with high spying bonuses have  specialized disguise abilities or advanced espionage equipment.  All offensive spies sent on missions will  receive the full bonus/penalty, while defensive spies receive one-half the amount.  Modifiers include -10  [-3], +10 [3], +20 [6].
column2: 間諜加成會影響種族的破壞與間諜技能。擁有高間諜加成的種族具備專精的偽裝能力或先進的間諜裝備。所有派出執行任務的攻擊型間諜都會獲得完整的加成/懲罰,防禦型間諜則只獲得一半數值。修正值包括:-10〔-3〕、+10〔3〕、+20〔6〕。

column1: Cost[-5]:  Races which come from low gravity worlds are considerably weaker than races from  normal-G worlds, and have great difficulty adapting to more intense gravity fields.  Colonists can operate  only in low-G worlds without penalty, and suffer half the heavy-G penalty in normal-G environments.   Finally, Low-G troops are weaker and suffer a -10 ground combat penalty.  Low-G and Heavy-G are  mutually exclusive.
column2: 成本〔-5〕:來自低重力行星的種族體格明顯弱於一般重力行星的種族,且極難適應更強的重力環境。此類殖民者僅能在低重力行星上不受懲罰地運作,在一般重力環境中則承受一半的高重力懲罰。此外,低重力部隊戰力較弱,地面戰鬥將承受 -10 的懲罰。低重力與高重力兩項特質互斥,不可同時選用。

column1: Cost[6]:  Races which come from heavy gravity worlds are considerably hardier than races  from normal-G worlds, and colonists can operate in both heavy-G and normal-G worlds without penalty. In  addition, ground troops can sustain substantially more physical damage than other troops, taking 1 more hit  than normal troops before being slain in ground combats.  Heavy-G and Low-G are mutually exclusive
column2: 成本〔6〕:來自高重力行星的種族體格明顯強於一般重力行星的種族,其殖民者在高重力與一般重力行星上皆能不受懲罰地運作。此外,地面部隊能承受遠比其他部隊更多的傷害,在地面戰鬥中陣亡前可比一般部隊多承受 1 次打擊。高重力與低重力兩項特質互斥,不可同時選用。

column1: Cost[5]: Aquatic races originated on ocean worlds, and therefore can more easily adapt to primarily  water based environments. Aquatic races treat Tundra and Swamp worlds as Terran and Ocean and  Terran as Gaia environments both for food production and maximum planetary population.
column2: 成本〔5〕:水棲種族起源於海洋行星,因此較容易適應以水域為主的環境。就糧食產量與行星最大人口而言,水棲種族會將凍原與沼澤行星視同陸地與海洋行星,並將陸地行星視同蓋亞行星。

column1: Cost[6]: Races which were originally subterranean are better adapted to living underground, and  are capable of building expansive complexes below the surface of a planet.  As a result, these races'  maximum population on all worlds is increased by twice that world's size class. Also, subterranean  ground troops receive a +10 combat bonus when defending their colonies.
column2: 成本〔6〕:原本就是地底種族的族群更適應地下生活,能夠在行星地表下建造規模龐大的建築群。因此,這些種族在所有行星上的最大人口都會依該行星的大小等級增加兩倍。此外,地底種族的地面部隊在防衛自身殖民地時可獲得 +10 的戰鬥加成。

column1: Cost[1]: The home world of your race is large instead of the normal  medium size.
column2: 成本〔1〕:您種族的母星為大型行星,而非一般的中型行星。

column1: Cost[2]:  The home world of your race is mineral rich, producing a base 5 production per worker. Rich Home World and Poor Home World are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[2]：貴種族的母星礦產豐富，每名工人可產生基礎5點生產力。「礦產豐富母星」與「礦產貧瘠母星」互斥。

column1: Cost[-1]:  The home world of your race is mineral poor, producing a base 2  production per worker. Poor Home World and Rich Home World are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[-1]：貴種族的母星礦產貧瘠，每名工人僅能產生基礎2點生產力。「礦產貧瘠母星」與「礦產豐富母星」互斥。

column1: Cost[3]:  The home world of your race has ancient artifacts.  All scientists produce +2 research on this planet.
column2: Cost[3]：貴種族的母星擁有古代文物遺跡。此星球上所有科學家皆額外產生+2點研究。

column1: Cost[4]:  Races which are cybernetic use mechanical appendages and  artificial organs to sustain life. They consume only one half food unit each, and  supplement the other half with one half production unit.  Cybernetics also have an  enhanced ability to repair their ships due to the ease with which they interface with  mechanical devices,  10% of a ship's armor and structure and 5% of a ship's  internal systems will be repaired each round of combat.  All damage to cybernetic  ships is repaired after combat. Cybernetics and Lithovore are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[4]：機械化種族使用機械義肢與人工器官維持生命。牠們每單位僅需消耗一半的食物，另一半則以半單位生產力補足。由於機械化種族與機械裝置介接容易，牠們的艦艇修復能力也大幅增強：每回合戰鬥中可修復艦體裝甲與結構的10%，以及艦載系統的5%。機械化艦艇在戰鬥結束後會修復所有損傷。「機械化」與「食礦生物」互斥。

column1: Cost[10]:  These are races which consume rocks instead of food, and thus  can subsist on any planet simply by eating the minerals.  Lithovores do not require  any food whatsoever. Lithovore and Cybernetics are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[10]：這類種族以岩石取代食物維生，因此僅需攝取星球上的礦物即可在任何星球生存。食礦生物完全不需要食物。「食礦生物」與「機械化」互斥。

column1: Cost[-6]: Other races find dealing with repulsive races impossible.  Therefore, repulsive races are unable to form any agreements with other races.  They can only use the diplomacy system to declare war and to sue for peace.  Legendary  officers demand an increase of 50% to their cost of hiring to serve with  repulsive races.  Furthermore,  these races assimilate conquered colonists into their population at half the normal rate.  Repulsive and Charismatic are  mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[-6]：其他種族認為與令人厭惡的種族打交道根本不可能。因此，令人厭惡的種族無法與其他種族締結任何協議，只能透過外交系統宣戰或求和。傳奇軍官若要為令人厭惡的種族效力，雇用成本會提高50%。此外，這些種族同化被征服殖民者的速度也只有正常速度的一半。「令人厭惡」與「魅力非凡」互斥。

column1: Cost[3]: Races which are extremely charismatic are quick to make allies and  can almost always talk themselves out of problems.  This ability doubles the effect  of all good diplomatic actions, and halves that of all negative ones.  When proposing  deals, charismatic races have a +50% bonus to their chance of the opponent  accepting. Charismatic races attract more legendary officers and leaders, halving  their hiring cost and increasing the frequency with which heroes ask to be hired.  In  addition, they double the rate at which conquered colonists are assimilated into  their empire.  Charismatic and Repulsive are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[3]：極具魅力的種族能迅速結交盟友，且幾乎總能靠三寸不爛之舌化解問題。此特質使所有正面外交行動的效果加倍，並將所有負面外交行動的效果減半。提出交易時，魅力非凡種族獲得對方接受機率+50%的加成。魅力非凡種族也更能吸引傳奇軍官與領袖，使其雇用成本減半，並提高英雄前來應徵的頻率。此外，牠們同化被征服殖民者的速度也會加倍。「魅力非凡」與「令人厭惡」互斥。

column1: Cost[-4]:  Races which are not particularly creative have great difficulty in  coming up with difficult new technology ideas.  Uncreative races will be able to research only 1 application selected randomly in any field. Uncreative and  Creative are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[-4]：不太具創造力的種族在構思困難的新科技概念時會遇到極大困難。缺乏創造力的種族在每個科技領域中，只能隨機研究出其中一項應用。「缺乏創造力」與「富有創造力」互斥。

column1: Cost[8]:  Races which are creative have little difficulty in coming up with new  technology ideas.  As a result, these races will gain every application in the fields  that they research, instead of only the specific application selected.  Creative and  Uncreative are mutually exclusive.
column2: Cost[8]：富有創造力的種族在構思新科技概念時幾乎沒有困難。因此，這些種族在研究某個領域時，會一併獲得該領域內的所有應用項目，而非僅限於特定選定的一項。「富有創造力」與「缺乏創造力」互斥。

column1: Cost[10]: These races typically regenerate, or have a  metabolism quite unlike that of a standard humanoid.  Races that are  environmentally tolerant treat all planet environments as Terran for purposes of  maximum population.  Tolerant races also ignore pollution, not spending any  industry to clean it up.  On multi-racial colonies, the proportion of non-tolerant  population to tolerant population determines the amount of pollution that must be  cleaned.  For example, If there are 3 tolerant and 7 non-tolerant population units  7/10 of the pollution must be cleaned up.
column2: Cost[10]：這類種族通常具有再生能力，或擁有與一般人形生物截然不同的新陳代謝方式。環境適應力強的種族在計算最大人口時，會將所有星球環境視為地球型環境。適應力強的種族也會無視污染，不需耗費工業產值來清理污染。在多種族殖民地中，非適應力強人口與適應力強人口的比例，決定了需要清理的污染比例。舉例來說，若有3個適應力強與7個非適應力強的人口單位，則需清理7/10的污染。

column1: Cost[4]: Races which are fantastic traders possess a keen  understanding of economics and deal making.  They add +25% bonus to the profit  they receive from trade treaties, and receive 1 BC per surplus food created.  In  addition, they receive a +100% bonus to the amount of money they receive for  building trade goods.
column2: Cost[4]：擅長貿易的種族對經濟與交易有敏銳的理解力。牠們從貿易條約中獲得的利潤享有+25%加成，且每產生一單位剩餘食物即可獲得1BC。此外，牠們建造貿易商品所獲得的金錢也享有+100%加成。

column1: Cost[6]:  Telepathic races are capable of reading the minds of other beings,  allowing them to exactly isolate the motivations of anyone that they are attempting  to negotiate with. As a result, telepathic races gain a +25% diplomacy bonus when  conducting negations with other races.  Telepaths can also use their mental abilities  for mind control. Telepathic fleets with at least one cruiser or larger ship can mind control a planet instead of bombarding or invading it.  Mind Control  gains ownership of the colony for all purposes instantly assimilating all population.  Finally, telepathic spies are extremely adept at evading enemy  agents and receive a +10% bonus to all spy actions.
column2: Cost[6]：心靈感應種族能夠讀取其他生物的思想，使牠們能精準洞悉談判對象的動機。因此，心靈感應種族在與其他種族進行外交談判時可獲得+25%的外交加成。心靈感應者也能運用其精神能力進行心靈控制：擁有至少一艘巡洋艦或更大型艦艇的心靈感應艦隊，可以對星球施展心靈控制，而不必轟炸或入侵它。心靈控制會立即取得該殖民地的所有權，並瞬間同化全部人口。最後，心靈感應間諜極擅長躲避敵方特工，所有間諜行動皆享有+10%加成。

column1: Cost[3]:  Races which are lucky do not suffer from random galactic disasters, and  have a greater chance of benefiting from good events.  Antarans will also have a  tendency to overlook the colonies of lucky players.
column2: Cost[3]：幸運的種族不會受到隨機銀河災難的影響，且更有機會從正面事件中受益。安塔蘭人也傾向於忽略幸運玩家的殖民地。

column1: Cost[3]:  Omniscient races are visionaries capable of spanning the galaxy  with their minds.  This allows you to know all star system and planetary data  throughout the entire galaxy at the start of the game.  In addition, enemy fleets are  automatically detected, regardless of stealth special abilities or technologies.
column2: Cost[3]：全知種族是能以心靈遍覽整個銀河的先知。這使你在遊戲開始時，便能得知整個銀河中所有星系與星球的資料。此外，敵方艦隊會被自動偵測到，無論其隱形特殊能力或科技為何。

column1: Cost[4]:  Races with stealthy ships have managed to completely mask  their ships from long range sensors. This special ability has no effect on  ship combat, but their ships will remain unseen on the main screen.
column2: Cost[4]：擁有隱形艦艇的種族能將艦艇完全隱蔽於遠程感測器之外。此特殊能力對艦艇戰鬥沒有影響，但其艦艇在主畫面上將不會顯示。

column1: Cost[5]:  Trans-dimensional beings are capable of folding the fabric  of space with their minds, allowing them to increase the speed at which ships travel  through the galaxy by 2 parsecs per turn. Furthermore, trans-dimensional races gain  +4 to their combat speed.
column2: Cost[5]：跨次元生物能以心靈折疊空間結構，使艦艇每回合的移動速度增加2秒差距。此外，跨次元種族的戰鬥速度獲得+4加成。

column1: Cost[4]:  Races with the warlord special ability have all of their crews function as one  level of experience higher than normal, and the crews have the potential to  eventually become ultra-elites.  Warlords double the rate at which marines and  tanks are built and allows barracks to support twice the normal number of troops.  Each colony produces 2 command points.
column2: Cost[4]：擁有軍閥特殊能力的種族，其所有船員的經驗等級皆自動提升一級，且船員最終有機會成為超級精英。軍閥種族建造陸戰隊與坦克的速度加倍，兵營可容納的部隊數量也是正常的兩倍。每個殖民地額外產生2點指揮點數。

column1:
Cost[-4]:  Feudal Governments are ruled by powerful families similiar to  medieval Europe.  Due to the fragmented and warlike nature of these  governments they receive certain benefits and penalties.
 ^	Ship costs are reduced by 1/3.
 ^	Planets suffer a -20% morale penalty unless 	they have a marine or armor barracks.
 ^	Feudal governments have all research 	generated by scientists reduced by 50%.
 ^	Feudal governments assimilate captured population 	at the rate of 1 population every 8 turns.
 ^	Feudal populations instantly assimilate when 	conquered by any other race.  There are always 	local barons looking out for themselves.
column2:
Cost[-4]：封建政府由類似中世紀歐洲的權貴家族統治。由於這類政府分裂且好戰的特質，牠們會獲得若干優點與缺點。
 ^	艦艇造價降低1/3。
 ^	除非星球擁有陸戰隊或裝甲兵營，否則將承受-20%的士氣懲罰。
 ^	封建政府由科學家產生的研究全部減少50%。
 ^	封建政府每8回合才同化1個人口單位的被征服人口。
 ^	封建政府的人口一旦被任何其他種族征服，會立即被同化。畢竟總有地方諸侯只顧自己的利益。

column1:
Cost[0]:  In this form of government, one being has absolute power.  All orders and decisions made are  final and the general populace is ruled with an iron hand.  This control confers several benefits and  disadvantages to dictatorships.
 ^	Defensive agents receive a +10 bonus due to 	increased internal security.
 ^	Planets suffer a -20% morale penalty unless 	they have a marine or armor barracks.
 ^	Dictatorships assimilate captured population 	at the rate of 1 population every 8 turns.
column2:
Cost[0]：在這種政府形式下，由單一個體掌握絕對權力。所有命令與決策皆為最終定案，一般民眾受到鐵腕統治。這種控制方式為獨裁政府帶來若干優缺點。
 ^	由於內部安全加強，防禦特工獲得+10加成。
 ^	除非星球擁有陸戰隊或裝甲兵營，否則將承受-20%的士氣懲罰。
 ^	獨裁政府每8回合才同化1個人口單位的被征服人口。

column1:
Cost[7]: The people elect representatives to run the government. No single body  of people directly controls the government and the personal freedoms are  greatest of all forms of governments.
 ^	Defensive agents are penalized -10  due to the emphasis on personal freedoms.
 ^	Democracies assimilate captured population 	at the rate of 1 population every 4 turns.
 ^	Due to the free exchange of ideas all research generated by scientists is increased +50%.
 ^	The government's concern with promoting trade increases all tax revenues by +50%.
 ^	Democracies are prohibited from annihilating captured populations.
column2:
Cost[7]：人民選舉代表來治理政府。沒有任何單一團體能直接掌控政府，個人自由在所有政府形式中最為充分。
 ^	由於強調個人自由，防禦特工受到-10的懲罰。
 ^	民主政府每4回合同化1個人口單位的被征服人口。
 ^	由於思想自由交流，科學家產生的研究全部增加+50%。
 ^	政府對促進貿易的重視，使所有稅收增加+50%。
 ^	民主政府禁止殲滅被征服的人口。

column1:
Cost[6]: Only a few races are genetically capable of forming a unified government.   The population exists harmoniously without jealousy, envy or concern for individual advancement.  Each individual works for the improvement of the whole, instead of the desires of  the individual. The unified government is the social equivalent of a colony of bees.
 ^	Defensive agents receive a +15 bonus due to 	the lack of traitors.
 ^	All morale affects and any buildings modifying morale are ignored by unification governments.
 ^	Unification governments assimilate captured population 	at the rate of 1 population every 20 turns.
 ^	Increased productivity results in a +50% bonus to all industrial production.
 ^	Increased productivity results in a +50% bonus to all food production.
column2:
Cost[6]：只有少數種族在基因上具備組成統一政府的能力。其人口和諧共處，沒有嫉妒、羨慕，也不追求個人的升遷。每個個體都為整體的進步而努力，而非追求個人慾望。統一政府在社會結構上相當於蜂群社會。
 ^	由於沒有叛徒，防禦特工獲得+15加成。
 ^	統一政府忽略所有士氣影響，以及任何影響士氣的建築效果。
 ^	統一政府每20回合才同化1個人口單位的被征服人口。
 ^	生產力提升為所有工業生產帶來+50%加成。
 ^	生產力提升為所有食物生產帶來+50%加成。

column1: Clears all racial advantages and disadvantages.
column2: 清除所有種族優點與缺點。

column1: Each player starts with 10 race development picks with which to design  a race.  Picks left may go negative, but no race will be accepted until  picks left is non-negative.
column2: 每位玩家開局擁有10點種族發展點數，可用於設計種族。剩餘點數可以為負值，但只有在剩餘點數為非負值時，該種族設定才會被系統接受。

column1: A player's final score in the game will be multiplied by this value.  If all race development picks are not used, a player's score will be increased.
column2: 玩家在遊戲中的最終分數將乘以此數值。若種族發展點數未全部用完，玩家的分數將會提高。

column1: Accepts the selected advantages and disadvantages for use in the game and continues on with the game setup.
column2: 接受目前選定的優點與缺點，並繼續進行遊戲設定。

column1: Pressing the 'ESC' key will abort the race customization process and return to the Race Selection Screen
column2: 按下「ESC」鍵將中止種族自訂流程，並返回種族選擇畫面

column1: This is the colony screen. It allows you to view all relavent information  about a single colony. It also allows you to change the production of a  colony, and make any other changes which can occur on the given colony.
column2: 這是殖民地畫面。它讓你檢視單一殖民地的所有相關資訊，也可以變更該殖民地的生產項目，以及進行該殖民地上可執行的其他任何變更。

column1: The status warning bar alerts you to potentially dangerous threats to the colony,  such as being blockaded, or a bad random event. Nothing is printed here if  nothing bad is effecting the colony at this time
column2: 狀態警示列會提醒你該殖民地目前面臨的潛在危險威脅，例如遭到封鎖或發生不利的隨機事件。若目前沒有任何不利因素影響該殖民地，此處將不會顯示任何內容

column1: This displays the name of the colony including its specialization if any. The specialization of a colony is purely cosmetic in effect.
column2: 顯示殖民地的名稱，若有指定專精則一併顯示。殖民地的專精純粹只是外觀效果，沒有實質作用。

column1: This displays the population of the colony, in the following format: 10,500 k (+ 55). In this case this means 10 million people, or 10 population units, plus 5 hundred  thousand or you are halfway to gaining the next population unit, and the part in parenthesis  is your growth rate.  It can be either positive or negative, indicating respectively  growth or loss of new members of the colonial population. In multiracial colonies this  display becomes less directly indicative of the time you gain your next full population  unit, as each race is growing at a seperate rate, and you are seeing the sum of all the  growth rates added to the number of functioning pop units.
column2: 以下列格式顯示殖民地人口：10,500 k (+ 55)。此例代表1000萬人，即10個人口單位，加上50萬人，也就是你已完成通往下一個人口單位進度的一半；括號內的部分則是你的成長率，可能為正值或負值，分別代表殖民地人口的成長或流失。在多種族殖民地中，此顯示值就不能直接反映距離下一個完整人口單位的時間，因為每個種族的成長速度各不相同，你所看到的是所有成長率加總後、再加上現有已完成的人口單位數。

column1: The Colony Screen System Display shows you the other planets in the system, and if they are colonized, will let you go there by left-clicking on the planet. Clicking on the text will give a  summary description of the planet.
column2: 殖民地畫面的星系顯示區會顯示同星系內的其他行星，若已被殖民，左鍵點擊該行星即可前往該處。點擊文字則會顯示該行星的摘要說明。

column1: This window displays the current building or unit being constructed at this  colony, along with a turn counter and a product completion bar showing how  close to completion the product is at this time.
column2: 此顯示區顯示該殖民地目前正在建造的建築或單位，並附有回合計數器與完成進度條，讓你了解該項目目前的完成進度。

column1: This display shows the monetary disposition for this colony, with gold coins showing one BC and stacks representing ten BC's\n \n BC's can be imported, exported or used locally. These uses are displayed as follows. First comes the amount used here, separated by a space, followed by either exports, which are bright, or by imports, which are darkened. The amounts of each are calculated automatically.
column2: 此顯示區以金幣圖示代表1BC、以錢堆代表10BC，呈現該殖民地的金錢收支狀況。\n \n BC可以進口、出口或在當地使用。這些用途的顯示方式如下：首先是本地使用量，以空格分隔，接著是出口量（以明亮色顯示）或進口量（以暗色顯示）。各項數值皆會自動計算。

column1: This display show the government, and the current morale for this colony.  First is the Government, being a small version of the government symbol followed by positive morale represented as Smiling/Comedy masks or negative morale represented as Frowning/Drama masks. Each of these represents a 10% change in  the total output of the colony.
column2: 此顯示區顯示該殖民地的政府體制與目前士氣狀況。首先是政府體制圖示，即該政府符號的縮小版，接著以微笑／喜劇面具代表正面士氣，或以皺眉／悲劇面具代表負面士氣。其中每個圖示代表殖民地總產出的10%變化。

column1:
The production window displays the output of a colonies workers for each of the three jobs,  Farmers, Workers and Scientists.
 
 Resources, such as food, can be imported, exported or used locally. These uses are displayed as follows.
 First comes the amount used here, separated by a space, followed by either exports, which are bright, or by imports, which are darkened. The amounts of each are calculated automatically.
column2:
生產視窗顯示殖民地工人在三種職業（農夫、工人、科學家）上的產出。
 
 資源（如食物）可以進口、出口或在當地使用。這些用途的顯示方式如下。
 首先是本地使用量，以空格分隔，接著是出口量（以明亮色顯示）或進口量（以暗色顯示）。各項數值皆會自動計算。

column1: Farmers produce food, as displayed by stalks of corn for one unit and bags of corn to display  10 units of food. To import food you must have one freighter per unit of food. Exported food which is not imported is sold for 1/2BCs each(unless you are a fantastic trader, which doubles  this amount).
column2: 農夫生產食物，以一束玉米代表1單位食物，一袋玉米代表10單位食物。若要進口食物，每單位食物需要一艘貨船。未被進口的出口食物將以每單位1/2BC的價格售出（除非你是擅長貿易的種族，此售價會加倍）。

column1: Workers produce industry which is used to build buildings and units on the production screen. A pick is one unit and a pick on a pile of ore is 10 units. Industry can neither be imported nor exported.
column2: 工人生產工業產值，用於在生產畫面建造建築與單位。一把鎬代表1單位，鎬旁堆放的礦石代表10單位。工業產值無法進口或出口。

column1: Scientists produce research, which is used to gain new technology. A test tube represents one  research point, a microscope represents 10 research points. science can neither be imported nor exported
column2: 科學家生產研究點數，用於獲取新科技。一支試管代表1點研究，一台顯微鏡代表10點研究。研究無法進口或出口

column1: This display show exactly how many population units (1,000,000 people each) are in each given job, Farmer, Worker or Scientist.
column2: 此顯示區精確顯示各職業（農夫、工人、科學家）分別有多少個人口單位（每單位100萬人）。

column1: This display shows the number of infantry or armor you have at this colony.  Infantry can either be Normal or Powersuited, and Armor can be either Tanks or Battleoids
column2: 此顯示區顯示該殖民地目前擁有的步兵與裝甲數量。步兵可分為一般型或動力裝甲型，裝甲可分為坦克型或戰鬥機甲型

column1: This button takes you to the Colony Building Queue Screen, where you can change what the colony is currently producing
column2: 此按鈕會帶你前往殖民地建造佇列畫面，你可以在該處變更殖民地目前的生產項目

column1: This button will let you spend BCs to accelerate the production of the currently produced product, assuming you currently have enough BCs in your reserve to do the job.
column2: 此按鈕可讓你花費BC加速目前生產項目的進度，前提是你的儲備金中有足夠的BC支付此費用。

column1: This button will take you to the Leaders Screen, where you hire move and fire leaders.
column2: 此按鈕會帶你前往領袖畫面，你可以在該處雇用、調動與解雇領袖。

column1: Allows you to return to the previous screen
column2: 讓你返回上一個畫面

column1: Shows a list of all the buildings you are currently able to build  at this colony. To add a building to the Queue, left click on it once.  Buildings already in the queue are drawn darkened and can be clicked  on again to remove them from the queue
column2: 顯示該殖民地目前可建造的所有建築清單。左鍵點擊一次即可將該建築加入佇列。已在佇列中的建築會以暗色顯示，再次點擊可將其從佇列中移除

column1: Shows the picture of the top element of the queue, or of the product  currently being scanned.
column2: 顯示佇列中第一項項目、或目前正在檢視項目的圖片。

column1: Shows the name, cost and other summary information for the top element  of the queue, or of the product currently being scanned.
column2: 顯示佇列中第一項項目、或目前正在檢視項目的名稱、造價及其他摘要資訊。

column1: Shows the list of all military and civilian units you can build at the colony.  Left clicking on them adds them to the queue.
column2: 顯示該殖民地可建造的所有軍用與民用單位清單。左鍵點擊即可將其加入佇列。

column1: Shows the description for the top element of the queue, or of the product  currently being scanned.
column2: 顯示佇列中第一項項目、或目前正在檢視項目的說明文字。

column1: Shows up to seven buildings or units which are either currently being built,  or waiting their turn to be built.\nClicking on a entry in the queue selects it. Clicking again on a selected entry deletes the entry. \nClicking on another entry, while one is selected,  moves the current entry to the spot immediatly below the clicked on entry, compacting the queue first if applicable. Clicking on a building or unit, while an entry is selected, adds the  product to the queue, if there is space, immediately above the current  entry, unless it is a building which is already in the queue, in which  case it deletes it, and leaves the selected entry selected.
column2: 顯示最多七項目前正在建造或等待建造的建築或單位。\n點擊佇列中的項目可選取該項目，再次點擊已選取的項目則會刪除該項目。 \n若已選取一個項目，此時點擊另一個項目，會將目前選取的項目移動到被點擊項目正下方的位置（必要時會先壓縮佇列）。若已選取一個項目，此時點擊某個建築或單位，只要佇列仍有空間，就會將該項目加入佇列中目前選取項目的正上方，除非該建築已在佇列中，此時則會將其從佇列中刪除，並保持原選取項目的選取狀態。

column1: This button, if active, shows that the computer is currently making all  decisions about which building to build at the current colony. If no building is chosen,  trade goods will be selected. Autobuild will never build a ship or other unit.
column2: 此按鈕啟用時，表示電腦目前會自動決定該殖民地要建造的建築。若未選定任何建築，將會自動選擇建造貿易商品。自動建造絕不會建造艦艇或其他單位。

column1: Calles the refit ship popup.
column2: 呼叫艦艇改裝彈出視窗。

column1: Sets the cursor to the 'Which Ship' cursor, allowing you to click on  a ship in the units list and goto the Design screen the change the  design in that slot.
column2: 將游標設為「選擇艦艇」游標，讓你可以點擊單位清單中的艦艇，前往設計畫面變更該欄位的設計。

column1: Sets the cursor to the 'What' cursor, allowing you to select a unit to be built repeatedly, until either you delete it from the queue, or the  rules do not allow another to be built
column2: 將游標設為「選擇項目」游標，讓你選取一個單位設為重複建造，直到你將其從佇列中刪除，或規則不允許再建造為止

column1: Allows you return to the previous screen, saving any changes you have made.
column2: 讓你返回上一個畫面，並儲存你所做的所有變更。

column1: This screen allows you to make any an all building and unit choice decisions you desire to make for the given colony.
column2: 此畫面讓你針對指定殖民地，做出你想要的任何建築與單位選擇決策。

column1: The Colony Summary Screen!
column2: 殖民地總覽畫面！

column1: It scrolls the list up
column2: 將清單向上捲動

column1: Shows the name of the colony
column2: 顯示殖民地名稱

column1: Shows the number of farmers. Farmers produce food.
column2: 顯示農夫的數量。農夫生產食物。

column1: Shows the number of workers. Workers produce industry.
column2: 顯示工人的數量。工人生產工業產值。

column1: Shows the number of Scientists. Scientists produce research.
column2: 顯示科學家的數量。科學家生產研究點數。

column1: Shows the amount of production of the currently scanned colony
column2: 顯示目前檢視中殖民地的生產量

column1: Allows you to attempt to purchase the current product in the queue
column2: 讓你嘗試花錢購買佇列中目前的生產項目

column1: Allows you to scroll the list up
column2: 讓你將清單向上捲動

column1: Allows you to scroll down the list of colonies which you currently have.
column2: 讓你向下捲動你目前擁有的殖民地清單。

column1: Lists information about the colony you are currently scanning
column2: 列出你目前檢視中殖民地的相關資訊

column1: Shows the icons for the number of each kind of production for the currently scanned colony
column2: 顯示目前檢視中殖民地各類生產數量的圖示

column1: Shows the galaxy map, the currently scanned star, the source and destination stars when moving colonists.
column2: 顯示銀河地圖、目前檢視中的星系，以及移動殖民者時的起點與終點星系。

column1: Shows the summary information for your entire empire
column2: 顯示你整個帝國的摘要資訊

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the name of the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地名稱排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the population of the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地人口排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the amount of food produced on the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地生產的食物量排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the amount of industry produced on the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地生產的工業產值排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the amount of research produced on the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地生產的研究量排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the products being produced on the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地目前生產的項目排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to sort the colonies by the amount of BC's produced on the colonies
column2: 讓你依殖民地產生的BC數量排序殖民地清單

column1: Allows you to select a ship from the list of ship which are at the star to refit
column2: 讓你從位於該星系可供改裝的艦艇清單中選擇一艘艦艇

column1: Shows the list of ship which are at this star and available to be refitted.
column2: 顯示位於該星系、可供改裝的艦艇清單。

column1: Shows the information for the ship which you are currently pointing at.
column2: 顯示你目前所指向艦艇的相關資訊。

column1: Allows you to exit without making any changes.
column2: 讓你不做任何變更即可離開。

column1: show the current pops for the given colony.
column2: 顯示指定殖民地目前的人口狀況。

column1: This screen allows you to quickly move population from one colony to another without going to the colony summary screen
column2: 此畫面讓你能快速將人口從一個殖民地遷移到另一個殖民地，而不需要進入殖民地總覽畫面

column1: The Colony Ground Combat Screen allows you to watch the invasion of a planet occur,   waiting or clicking once begins the combat, clicking again accelerates it to the end,   after it has ended, clicking again exits the screen
column2: 殖民地地面戰鬥畫面讓你觀看行星入侵作戰的過程：等待或點擊一次會開始戰鬥，再次點擊會加速播放直到結束，結束後再次點擊即可離開此畫面

column1: Shows the bonuses and units available on this plant to invade
column2: 顯示可用於入侵該行星的加成與單位

column1: Shows the bonuses and units available on this plant to defend against invaders
column2: 顯示可用於防禦該行星、抵抗入侵者的加成與單位

column1: The occupation policy popup allows you choose to annihilate all the colonists which are not of your race.
column2: 佔領政策彈出視窗讓你選擇是否殲滅所有非本族的殖民者。

column1: Left clicking here allows you to cycle through the  different galaxy ages, mineral rich, normal and organic rich. Mineral rich increases the chance of planets which have mineral  resources and decreases the chance of generating ones which create food. Organic rich does the opposite.
column2: 在此處左鍵點擊可循環切換不同的銀河年代：礦產豐富、一般，以及有機資源豐富。礦產豐富會提高擁有礦產資源行星的出現機率，並降低產生食物資源行星的出現機率。有機資源豐富則效果相反。

column1: The New Game screen allows you to select the options for the game you are about to begin.
column2: 新遊戲畫面讓你選擇即將開始遊戲的各項選項。

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose between the various levels of the game difficulty, Tutor, Ease, Average, Hard and Impossible.
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇不同的遊戲難度：新手、簡單、普通、困難與不可能。

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose between the various levels of galaxy size, which effect the number of stars and overall  volume of space included in the galaxy about to be created
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇不同的銀河大小等級，這會影響即將建立的銀河中星數量與整體空間規模

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose between the various levels of starting technology. Prewarp, Average, and Advanced.\n\n Advanced Civilization starts you with a larger empire, filling up your  share of the galaxy depending on size and number of players.  It also starts you with several levels of technological advancement,  and a fleet which uses up all of your command points.
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇不同的起始科技等級：前躍遷期、普通與先進文明。\n\n 選擇「先進文明」會讓你以較大的帝國開局，依銀河大小與玩家數量佔有相應的領地份額。你也會以數個等級的科技進度開局，並擁有一支耗盡所有指揮點數的艦隊。

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose between the various levels of starting technology. Prewarp, Average, and Advanced.\n\n Average Civilization starts you at a single star, on the very cusp of interstellar travel. You begin with two scouts and a colony ship, and only the most basic of technology.
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇不同的起始科技等級：前躍遷期、普通與先進文明。\n\n 選擇「普通文明」會讓你以單一星系開局，恰好站在星際旅行的門檻上。你會以兩艘偵察艦與一艘殖民船開局，並僅擁有最基本的科技。

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose between the various levels of starting technology. Prewarp, Average, and Advanced.\n\n Prewarp Civilization starts you at a single star, with no ships, and even  the most basic of technology must be researched before you can build  even your first interstellar ship.
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇不同的起始科技等級：前躍遷期、普通與先進文明。\n\n 選擇「前躍遷期文明」會讓你以單一星系開局，沒有任何艦艇，甚至連最基本的科技都必須先研發完成，才能建造出你的第一艘星際艦艇。

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose between the various levels of starting technology. Prewarp, Average, and Advanced.
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇不同的起始科技等級：前躍遷期、普通與先進文明。

column1: Clicking here allows you to choose the number of players, including yourself, to be in the game.
column2: 在此處點擊可選擇本局遊戲的玩家人數（包含你自己）。

column1: Clicking here allows you to turn on and off the Random Events
column2: 在此處點擊可開啟或關閉隨機事件

column1: Clicking here allows you to change between Tactical and Strategic Combat. Strategic combat means that the computer will play out any combats for you, returning you the results, and design all the ships for you as well.
column2: 在此處點擊可在「戰術戰鬥」與「戰略戰鬥」之間切換。戰略戰鬥模式下，所有戰鬥將由電腦自動進行並回報結果，艦艇設計也會一併由電腦代為完成。

column1: Clicking here allows you to turn on and off the Antarans attacking players in this game.
column2: 在此處點擊可開啟或關閉本局遊戲中安塔蘭人對玩家的攻擊。

column1: Clicking here allows you to accept the current settings and continue with the game.
column2: 在此處點擊可接受目前設定並繼續進行遊戲。

column1: This popup informs you when a player is attacked and by whom.
column2: 此彈出視窗會告知你有玩家遭受攻擊，以及攻擊者是誰。

column1: This popup gives you summary information on the potential colony and  allows you to decide whether or not to colonize it.
column2: 此彈出視窗提供潛在殖民目標的摘要資訊，讓你決定是否要在該處建立殖民地。

column1: This popup allows you to set your tax rate. The percentage value of the  tax rate is the percentage of all production from all your colonies to be  turned into cash
column2: 此彈出視窗讓你設定稅率。稅率的百分比數值，代表你所有殖民地生產總量中要轉換為現金的比例

column1: This popup allows you to bribe a space dragon not to attack your system,  and to select what other system you would like it to goto next.
column2: 此彈出視窗讓你賄賂太空巨龍，使其不攻擊你的星系，並可選擇讓牠前往其他星系。

column1: This popup tells shows you all the relevant information about a given newly explored system, including specials if any.
column2: 此彈出視窗會顯示某個新探索星系的所有相關資訊，包括其特殊性質（若有的話）。

column1: This popup allows you to select a planet to perform one of the following operations on, build a new colony, outpost, artificial planet, or drop troops on a planet to reinforce  its defenses. If you are building from a ship, and hit cancel, you will not be prompted again to build here until you hit the appropriate button on the fleet popup.
column2: 此彈出視窗讓你選擇一顆行星，執行以下其中一項操作：建立新殖民地、前哨站、人工行星，或空投部隊以強化該行星的防禦。若你是從艦艇進行建造，且選擇取消，系統將不會再次提示你在此處建造，除非你點擊艦隊彈出視窗中的對應按鈕。

column1: This popup informs you of the occurence of one of several things. It can tell you about  when an officer gains a level, or when a marooned officer joins you or fails to join because you have  no room for it.
column2: 此彈出視窗會通知你發生的若干事件，例如某位軍官升級，或某位遇難的軍官加入你陣營，抑或因無空缺而未能加入。

column1: This popup allows you to select a colony or fleet to attack, or to select not  to attack at all. Hitting cancel chooses not to attack, and you will not  be prompted again until either the situation at the star changes (new ships etc) or you hit the attack button on the fleet. popup
column2: 此彈出視窗讓你選擇要攻擊的殖民地或艦隊，或是選擇不進行攻擊。點擊取消表示不攻擊，且系統不會再次提示你，除非該星系的情況發生變化（例如出現新艦艇），或你點擊艦隊彈出視窗中的攻擊按鈕。

column1: Select a category of diplomatic action from the menu of choices. Selections that are presently unavailable are darkened.
column2: 從選單中選擇一項外交行動的類別。目前無法使用的選項會以暗色顯示。

column1: Suggest forming an alliance, peace treaty, trade treaty, research treaty, or non-aggression treaty.
column2: 提議締結同盟、和平條約、貿易條約、研究條約或互不侵犯條約。

column1: Cancel an existing treaty or alliance.
column2: 取消現有的條約或同盟關係。

column1: Require this Empire to perform a specific action to appease you.
column2: 要求該帝國執行特定行動以平息你的不滿。

column1: Offer a tribute, tech, or star system to appease the selected Emperor.
column2: 提供貢品、科技或星系，以平息所選皇帝的不滿。

column1: Suggest trading an application you have discovered for one the selected Race posesses.
column2: 提議以你已研發的科技應用，交換所選種族擁有的科技應用。

column1: Formal declaration of war against this Empire.
column2: 正式向該帝國宣戰。

column1: Turn control of your Empire over to the selected Emperor.
column2: 將你帝國的統治權交給所選的皇帝。

column1: Exits from this screen.
column2: 離開此畫面。

column1: Select a treaty to offer. Unavailable selections appear darkened.
column2: 選擇要提議的條約。目前無法選擇的項目會以暗色顯示。

column1: A Trade treaty generates income based on the minimum of the two empires population.  The  break-even point is 5 turns and it will take at least 10 turns to reach the maximum.
column2: 貿易條約會依兩帝國人口中較低者，產生相應的收入。損益兩平點為第5回合，且至少需要10回合才能達到最大值。

column1: A Research treaty generates research points based on the minimum of the two empires population.  The  break-even point is 5 turns and it will take at least 10 turns to reach the maximum.
column2: 研究條約會依兩帝國人口中較低者，產生相應的研究點數。損益兩平點為第5回合，且至少需要10回合才能達到最大值。

column1: Propose an end to the current war with this Empire.
column2: 提議結束與該帝國目前的戰爭狀態。

column1: Propose that neither race will mount an offensive against the other.
column2: 提議雙方種族皆不對彼此發動攻勢。

column1: Propose that neither race will mount an offensive against the other.  Allies also get to  use each others colonies for range purposes.
column2: 提議雙方種族皆不對彼此發動攻勢。盟友之間也可以互相使用對方的殖民地作為航程補給範圍。

column1: Select the treaty that you wish to cancel. Unavailable selections appear darkened.
column2: 選擇你希望終止的條約。無法選擇的項目會以灰階顯示。

column1: End the current Trade Treaty with this Empire.
column2: 終止與此帝國目前的貿易條約。

column1: End the current Research Treaty with this Empire.
column2: 終止與此帝國目前的研究條約。

column1: End the current Tribute Treaty with this Empire.
column2: 終止與此帝國目前的納貢條約。

column1: End the current Non-Aggression Treaty with this Empire.
column2: 終止與此帝國目前的互不侵犯條約。

column1: End the current Alliance with this Empire.
column2: 終止與此帝國目前的同盟關係。

column1: Select the action you require to be taken. Unavailable options appear darkened.
column2: 選擇你要求對方採取的行動。無法選擇的項目會以灰階顯示。

column1: Choose a third race you wish this Emperor to declare war against.
column2: 選擇一個你希望此君主對其宣戰的第三方種族。

column1: Choose a third race you wish this Emperor to sign a peace treaty with.  This option is  not available in multi-player games.
column2: 選擇一個你希望此君主與其簽訂和平條約的第三方種族。此選項在多人遊戲中無法使用。

column1: Choose a third race you wish this Emperor to end their alliance with.
column2: 選擇一個你希望此君主終止同盟關係的第三方種族。

column1: Require this Emperor to pay you an annual sum equal to 5% of their treasury.
column2: 要求此君主每年支付相當於其國庫5%的金額給你。

column1: Require this Emperor to pay you an annual sum equal to 10% of their treasury.
column2: 要求此君主每年支付相當於其國庫10%的金額給你。

column1: Require this Emperor to remove all spies from your territory.
column2: 要求此君主撤離你領土內的所有間諜。

column1: Choose an application you want this Emperor to give you.
column2: 選擇一項你希望此君主給予你的科技應用。

column1: Choose a star sytem you want this Emperor to give you.
column2: 選擇一個你希望此君主割讓給你的星系。

column1: Call for this Emperor to remove all ships in orbit around your colonies.
column2: 要求此君主撤離環繞你殖民地軌道上的所有艦艇。

column1: Select a gift to give this Emperor to improve diplomatic relations.
column2: 選擇一份要贈與此君主的禮物,以改善外交關係。

column1: Pay this Emperor an annual sum equal to 5% of your treasury.
column2: 每年支付相當於你國庫5%的金額給此君主。

column1: Pay this Emperor an annual sum equal to 10% of your treasury.
